programme.desc: Niles is left jumping for joy by an exciting proposal from Maris, while Frasier suggests the family tries something different to mark the leap year. However, all his efforts end in disaster. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Disgruntled to learn his favourite table at Cafe Nervosa has been commandeered by a rude fellow customer, Frasier resorts to physical violence to reclaim it - but later regrets losing his temper

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Martin agrees to a game of chess against Frasier - who keeps losing successive rematches but has trouble accepting defeat graciously. Kelsey Grammer and John Mahoney star

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Egos inflate to record proportions as the Crane brothers clash during a court battle to decide the mental competence of an eccentric millionaire. Guest starring Donald O'Connor

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads for Pasadena, California, where he visits Jamaican-themed restaurant Cafe Kingston. The business in run by Dr Una Morris, a micro-managing owner who also works at a radiotherapy clinic next door, and is determined to introduce hospital-style techniques to the kitchen by sealing everything in plastic bags

programme.title: Channel 4 News Summary
programme.desc: Midday news summary

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon O'Brien and Henry Cole visit Lincolnshire to meet mangle collector Colin, who's trying to find a home for his late father's possessions, including a motorbike won in a raffle

programme.title: Help! We Bought a Village
programme.desc: Mick and Julie's medieval hamlet has gruesome secrets buried in the walls. Norwich couple Ted and Lesa try to renovate a village in France while living in a tent. Londoner Penny is hoping to sell her beautifully restored Italian borgo

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host, with Lucy Porter in Dictionary Corner, as contestants race against the clock to pit their wits against words and numbers

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Ben Hillman helps Lisa from Bedfordshire find the perfect holiday home for her and her family in northern Tenerife, known as the Island of Eternal Spring and famous for its volcanic black-sand beaches. With Lisa's husband Jonathan tied up with work, she brings along her best friend Jo to keep her from getting carried away while they're looking. Ben shows them five fabulous properties for Lisa's maximum budget of £300,000, from a quirky hilltop house to a detached 'castle' villa

programme.title: Escape to Florida
programme.desc: St Patrick's Day is the busiest time of year for Northern Irish couple Seán and Áine, who own The Salty Shamrock pub and plan a dog show to raise local spirits after a hurricane. Down the coast in Sarasota, Yorkshireman Nick is putting on a Brits-only beach barbecue, much to the displeasure of his American housemate Jeff

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: In the Charente, Sophie and Ray begin transforming a tower room into a bridal suite. But the space currently looks like a 1970s sauna and there are bird droppings in the ceiling. In Brittany, Donna and Paul face a balcony crisis and are forced to winch oversized flooring up the outside of their home

programme.title: Sun, Sea and Selling Houses
programme.desc: In Alicante, Charlotte Rodriguez and her brother-in-law Damon search with Sara from Devon, who's decided to swap hospital beds for sun beds on the Spanish Costas after 34 years with the NHS. In Málaga, Shani and Andrew Hamilton line up three properties for Irish German couple Joy and Bernd and their two dogs

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: The Dog House
programme.desc: When it comes to dating etiquette, Breeze the American bulldog cross leaves a lot to be desired upon meeting Charlotte. Will the 31-year-old still fall for him though? Nettle the pointer would like some stability in her life, but it remains to be seen whether she can stay put long enough for any potential new owners to fall for her. The Woodgreen staff hope that Eileen from Middlesbrough will prove the ideal person to help nervy terrier Austin find his confidence

programme.title: Virgin Island
programme.desc: Jason begins to lower his guard as he commits to individual therapy with Aisha. Ellen continues to flourish with surrogate partner therapist Kat, building confidence and emotional connection as she edges closer to a major personal breakthrough. Alex and Joy's relationship takes a significant step forward, as they become the first couple to spend private time together on the island

programme.title: Virgin Island
programme.desc: The retreat enters its final phase. Bertie progresses to the bedroom with surrogate-partner therapist Kat and learns the lesson of a lifetime. Katie and Callum's romance intensifies as they choose to spend time alone together. Marianne faces her final sessions with surrogate partner Andre. Has she finally overcome her mistrust of men and is she now ready to go all the way with intimacy?

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: Miquita and Andi Oliver, Mo Gilligan with Babatunde Aléshé, Jamie Carragher and Micah Richards, Nick Grimshaw and his niece Liv, Big Zuu, Hyder and Tubsey, Shaun Ryder and Bez, Clare Balding and Alice Arnold, and Denise van Outen and Duncan James comment on the week's TV. Programmes discussed include Glastonbury, Hijack, A Wright Family Holiday, Cocaine Bear, Below Deck Sailing Yacht, Puzzling and Antiques Roadshow. First shown in June 2023

programme.title: Love Cheats
programme.desc: The case of a woman who claimed to have MS and conned her partner into running up huge debts to fund treatment, before falsely accusing him of domestic violence. When she threatened to kill herself in Japan, unless friends raise $20,000 that she claimed had been stolen, people started to question the truth of her stories and the FBI became involved

programme.title: Salisbury Poisonings: The Untold Story
programme.desc: The documentary picks up four months after the attempted assassination, when there was still no sign of the source of the Novichok. Salisbury re-opened after months under lockdown - only for civilians Dawn Sturgess and Charlie Rowley to fall ill in nearby Amesbury. As the death of the former turned it into a murder investigation, questions began to be asked about how well the UK reacted to such unprecedented Russian aggression and the stark security lessons that were learnt

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef again comes to the aid of failing American restaurants, starting in Fishtown, Philadelphia, where he tries to help the three owners of the Hot Potato Cafe, which has not made a profit in two years. Spurred on by a scathing review by an influential critic, he makes radical changes to alter the staff's attitudes and create food that is up to his own exacting standards

programme.title: Extraordinary Escapes with Sandi Toksvig
programme.desc: Sandi and sketch comedian Doon Mackichan visit Donegal in the Republic of Ireland to see what it has to offer. Their first stop is at Tuath na Mara which boasts access to a secluded sandy cove, perfect for outdoor swimming enthusiast Doon. Sandi shares a personal confession and the pair go for an icy dip in the North Atlantic. Next, the duo stay at the eco-resort Lough Mardal Lodge where they meet miniature cows and share stories of Mongolian princesses. They end their adventure in the countryside just north of Donegal Bay where they stay in Candlewick Cottage in which Doon serenades Sandi with improvised comedy tunes on the piano

programme.title: Sarah Beeny's New Country Lives
programme.desc: Dave and Lynn need help with the layout and decoration of their living room, while Kay plans her first ever craft fair

programme.title: Hollyoaks Omnibus
programme.desc: Frankie wants to come clean to Caleb, while Charlie's crumbling under the weight of his lies, and the village gathers for Rex and Ste's wedding. Diane reflects on her life in Hollyoaks as the Osbornes and Keanes feud downstairs in The Dog. Wanting to make every moment count, the Hutchinsons leave the customers to it and join Diane

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host, with Lucy Porter in Dictionary Corner, as contestants race against the clock to pit their wits against words and numbers

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam and Diane go to dinner with Frasier and his new live-in girlfriend Lilith, but the evening proves far from successful. Comedy, starring Ted Danson and Bebe Neuwirth

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: A friend of Frasier's drops in for a drink at the bar and when Diane learns he is an eminent marriage guidance counsellor, she asks him to assess her relationship with Sam. John Cleese guest stars

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam asks small-town boy Woody to chaperone his god-daughter Joyce round town now she has moved to Boston - but soon sees the disadvantages of his choice. Ted Danson and Woody Harrelson star

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert is ecstatic when he is recommended for a job with the FBI, until it starts to look like Marie's intrusive ways may scupper his chances

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray and Debra amuse the guests at a party by doing a wickedly accurate impression of Frank and Marie - who are not amused and respond in kind with an impersonation of their own

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra finds a cassette that contains a message from Ray's college girlfriend, and wants to know why he has saved it for all these years. She also shows Ray some of her keepsakes from previous relationships, prompting a severe case of jealousy on his part

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The shrink falls head over heels for an policewoman, unaware she finds his dad a much more interesting proposition. Comedy, guest starring Malcolm in the Middle's Jane Kaczmarek

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The radio station's new owner is about to visit, so Frasier decides to do a little grovelling - especially as the man could make his show a nationwide success

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Roz begins to date a compulsive womaniser who also happens to be one of Niles' patients, but when Frasier tries to warn her she is heading for heartache, she mistakes his concern for jealousy. Comedy, starring Peri Gilpin and Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The shrink's radio show survives a stern focus-group test, but he cannot help wondering why one of the members was less impressed than the others. Meanwhile, Daphne finds the thought of returning to Manchester difficult. Comedy, guest starring Tony Shalhoub (Monk), with Kelsey Grammer and Jane Leeves

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay heads to Eagle Rock in California to try to change the fortunes of Capri, a grubby restaurant that often remains closed during lunchtime because of the twin owners' lazy attitude. A crisis ensues as soon as Gordon instructs the duo to clean the place, revealing that only tough measures are likely to save the business

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: In Somerset, Simon O'Brien and Henry Cole meet sisters Katherine and Bex, who run an animal sanctuary and a theatre props business. Restorations and upcycles include work on a giant guinea pig hutch

programme.title: Help! We Bought a Village
programme.desc: The owners of a hamlet in France visit two mysterious stone towers on the edge of their land. A couple from Manchester host the descendants of a farmer who lived in their village

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the long-running words-and-numbers game with Lucy Porter joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Helen from Buckinghamshire retired recently and is now looking for her dream holiday home for herself and her two children in La Zenia, south-western Spain. Helping Helen with this house-hunt is her best friend Shelley, who plans to come out and stay. For her budget of £105,000 Helen wants Craig Rowe to assist in finding her a three-bedroom house or apartment with a communal pool

programme.title: Escape to Florida
programme.desc: Seán and Áine's Apollo Beach dream has been severely tested by a recent hurricane. Laura juggles romance and horse dentistry during Independence Day celebrations in Groveland, and film director Damian braves alligators in the Everglades

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: In the Charente, Sophie and Ray struggle to bring the modern to the ancient. At Château Domaine de la Barde, a laundry room renovation has Krys and Tim in a spin. And at Château de Cézérac, Jon and Carmen encounter problems with their potager

programme.title: Sun, Sea and Selling Houses
programme.desc: In Alicante, Charlotte Rodriguez and her brother-in-law Damon are looking for a new holiday home for insurance broker Darren and his wife Tanya from Essex. On the Costa del Sol, husband-and-wife team Andrew and Shani Hamilton meet up with repeat clients David, wife Jackie and son Ryan, who are looking for an upgraded holiday home

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Jamie's Ultimate BBQ
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver cooks his barbecue breakfast, which takes a much-loved classic to smoky heights, then serves up his smoke-kissed sesame chicken burger, accompanied by crunchy slaw and Korean-inspired sauce. His veggie barbecue platter offers the perfect spread, comprising smoky baba ghanoush, dressed roasted peppers, minty courgettes and halloumi cheese with apricots, then finishes off with his surf 'n' turf mixed grill, cooked on a plancha griddle with butter and wine

programme.title: Falling
programme.desc: Drama written by Jack Thorne, and starring Keeley Hawes and Paapa Essiedu. Sister Anna has been living a peaceful life as a nun in a convent for more than two decades. But a chance encounter with intriguing priest Father David leaves her with an uneasy feeling and threatens to disrupt the order that has governed her whole life so far.

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Staff in Major Trauma at Queen's Medical Centre in Nottingham are overstretched and pushed to the limit as they face ever-increasing patient numbers. Jeremy and Patricia are admitted with multiple injuries following a high-speed car crash. Doctors are concerned that Jeremy's history of cancer could affect his recovery, while the emergency team tries to determine the full extent of Patricia's spinal injury. Andrew, 45, is in resus after falling three metres from a ladder at work and seriously fracturing his ankle. Medics need to re-align his bones before emergency surgery

programme.title: Marilyn and the Mob
programme.desc: Part two of two. In the summer of 1962, Marilyn travelled to Nevada with Frank Sinatra, placing her among mob figures and dangerous rumours. Days later, she was found dead in her Los Angeles home. Although her death was ruled a suicide, circumstances and later investigations fuelled decades of speculation. Marilyn was caught between fame, political power and organised crime. But was her death a conspiracy or an accident?

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: The crew of Warwickshire, Northamptonshire, Derbyshire, Leicestershire and Rutland Air Ambulance race to reach Anthony, who's in traumatic cardiac arrest after coming off his motorbike at high speed. In Buckingham, Thames Valley Air Ambulance look after Carol after she's been trampled by a foal and in Eccles-on-Sea, Carter needs the help of the East Anglian Air Ambulance service after coming off his jet ski. In Brundall, teenager Harry has an open leg fracture after walking in front of a car

programme.title: Wonders of the World I Can't See
programme.desc: Chris McCausland and Liza Tarbuck head to Canada to experience the majestic natural marvel that is Niagara Falls. It's the only wonder in the series that makes a noise, so Chris is especially excited to be here. The pair explore the wider Canadian cultural landscape of axe throwing, bushcraft and poutine before heading into the heart of the falls for an emotional final experience

programme.title: Extraordinary Escapes with Sandi Toksvig
programme.desc: Sandi is joined by comedian and author Rosie Jones for a journey round the Midlands exploring the best staycation retreats they have to offer. The pair begin in Rutland where they stay at the Rocket Lodge, an eco-build made of upcycled grain silos that boasts a wood-fired hot-tub, a circular kitchen and a disco bathroom. In the sand dunes on a strip of the Lincolnshire coastline, the duo stay in a rebooted 70s beach house called Sandy Feet where Sandi learns that 'Netflix and chill' doesn't mean what she thinks it does. They end their trip close to the Welsh border on the Walcot Estate in a 200-year-old hideaway known as the Wheelwright's shop that once lived 20 miles away but was dismantled and transported piece by piece before being rebuilt to look exactly the same

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to Flamangos restaurant in Whitehouse, New Jersey, where he tries to help the mother-and-daughter owners turn around their struggling business's fortunes. He faces a struggle because parent Adelle has a bad relationship with her staff and is disappointed by the resident chef, leaving Gordon with the added challenge of changing her attitude

programme.title: Love Cheats
programme.desc: The case of a woman who claimed to have MS and conned her partner into running up huge debts to fund treatment, before falsely accusing him of domestic violence. When she threatened to kill herself in Japan, unless friends raise $20,000 that she claimed had been stolen, people started to question the truth of her stories and the FBI became involved

programme.title: Do You Know This Man?
programme.desc: The story of two women who, as teenagers in the 1990s, were groomed and sexually abused by a friend's father. Years later, as adults, the women recognised what had been done to them and reported it to police. But the case collapsed in court due to a procedural error and their abuser walked free. So Laura posted a public appeal on social media for other victims to come forward. In 2018, a third woman responded. This documentary traces three survivors' fight for justice, revealing the reality of grooming and the trauma of being disbelieved

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three restaurants he helped that were among the biggest challenges he faced, finding out whether they stayed on the road to recovery or turned back into nightmares. First he meets sisters Rita and Lisa to see if they have continued serving fresh instead of frozen food at Boston's La Galleria 33, before heading to the Olde Hitching Post in Hanson, Massachusetts, to discover whether controlling owner Tom has kept his promise and handed over the reins to his daughter Andrea. Finally, Gordon goes back to the Prohibition gastro pub in Everett, Washington, to catch up with owner Rishi and learn if she has ditched belly-dancing in favour of running her business

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Krusty nearly kills Homer after a bad TV review and hides out in a circus, but soon finds himself the centre of attention

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer and Marge buy a self-help video to improve their lives - but make the mistake of enlisting Bart and Lisa's assistance. Featuring the voices of James Brown and Albert Brooks

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer teaches an adult education course on the secrets of marital bliss. However, Marge spoils it by kicking him out of the house for revealing intimate domestic details to his students

programme.title: Sarah Beeny's New Country Lives
programme.desc: Emma and James consider making a non-profit visitor attraction with all the rescue animals they have taken in

programme.title: Kirstie's House of Craft
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp makes colourful recycled candles and a fun painted pebble game with her sons, and demonstrates how to make loo roll animals

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the long-running words-and-numbers game with Rory Bremner joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Cheers
programme.sub-title: Never Love a Goalie - Part Two
programme.desc: Part two of two. Carla's concern grows over the Boston Bruins' mysterious losing streak, and she decides the only possible cure is to end her relationship with goalkeeper Eddie. Rhea Perlman, Ted Danson and Shelley Long star

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam and Diane agree to a pre-marital separation to rid their systems of any lustful urges, so the guys in the bar throw a bachelor party, complete with a special cake containing a girl. Comedy, starring Ted Danson and Shelley Long

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Cliff considers suing the owner of a dog that bit him on his round - until he discovers she is a beautiful woman who will do anything to avoid legal action

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra grudgingly agrees to let Ray have more involvement in the daily decision-making process, giving him the freedom to shop for grocery items he likes and choose where the family will go on holiday. Comedy, starring Ray Romano and Patricia Heaton

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra, Ray and Amy get trapped at Frank and Marie's house during a snowstorm, but they actually find themselves having a good time - until an unguarded comment alters the mood. Comedy, starring Ray Romano, Patricia Heaton and Monica Horan

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray discovers the leader of local group the Frontier Girls is intending to sell a record number of cookies in his area, and sets out to beat her at her own game. Comedy, starring Ray Romano and Amy Aquino

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles is left jumping for joy by an exciting proposal from Maris, while Frasier suggests the family tries something different to mark the leap year. However, all his efforts end in disaster. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

Her date Lee seems like the perfect match - a professional singer who is hoping to turn his solo act into a romantic duet

Meanwhile, Daphne finds the thought of returning to Manchester difficult. Comedy, guest starring Tony Shalhoub (Monk), with Kelsey Grammer and Jane Leeves

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay heads to Eagle Rock in California to try to change the fortunes of Capri, a grubby restaurant that often remains closed during lunchtime because of the twin owners' lazy attitude. A crisis ensues as soon as Gordon instructs the duo to clean the place, revealing that only tough measures are likely to save the business

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: In Somerset, Simon O'Brien and Henry Cole meet sisters Katherine and Bex, who run an animal sanctuary and a theatre props business. Restorations and upcycles include work on a giant guinea pig hutch

programme.title: Help! We Bought a Village
programme.desc: The owners of a hamlet in France visit two mysterious stone towers on the edge of their land. A couple from Manchester host the descendants of a farmer who lived in their village

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the long-running words-and-numbers game with Lucy Porter joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Helen from Buckinghamshire retired recently and is now looking for her dream holiday home for herself and her two children in La Zenia, south-western Spain. Helping Helen with this house-hunt is her best friend Shelley, who plans to come out and stay. For her budget of £105,000 Helen wants Craig Rowe to assist in finding her a three-bedroom house or apartment with a communal pool

programme.title: Escape to Florida
programme.desc: Seán and Áine's Apollo Beach dream has been severely tested by a recent hurricane. Laura juggles romance and horse dentistry during Independence Day celebrations in Groveland, and film director Damian braves alligators in the Everglades

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: In the Charente, Sophie and Ray struggle to bring the modern to the ancient. At Château Domaine de la Barde, a laundry room renovation has Krys and Tim in a spin. And at Château de Cézérac, Jon and Carmen encounter problems with their potager

programme.title: Sun, Sea and Selling Houses
programme.desc: In Alicante, Charlotte Rodriguez and her brother-in-law Damon are looking for a new holiday home for insurance broker Darren and his wife Tanya from Essex. On the Costa del Sol, husband-and-wife team Andrew and Shani Hamilton meet up with repeat clients David, wife Jackie and son Ryan, who are looking for an upgraded holiday home

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Jamie's Ultimate BBQ
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver cooks his barbecue breakfast, which takes a much-loved classic to smoky heights, then serves up his smoke-kissed sesame chicken burger, accompanied by crunchy slaw and Korean-inspired sauce. His veggie barbecue platter offers the perfect spread, comprising smoky baba ghanoush, dressed roasted peppers, minty courgettes and halloumi cheese with apricots, then finishes off with his surf 'n' turf mixed grill, cooked on a plancha griddle with butter and wine

programme.title: Falling
programme.desc: Drama written by Jack Thorne, and starring Keeley Hawes and Paapa Essiedu. Sister Anna has been living a peaceful life as a nun in a convent for more than two decades. But a chance encounter with intriguing priest Father David leaves her with an uneasy feeling and threatens to disrupt the order that has governed her whole life so far.

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Staff in Major Trauma at Queen's Medical Centre in Nottingham are overstretched and pushed to the limit as they face ever-increasing patient numbers. Jeremy and Patricia are admitted with multiple injuries following a high-speed car crash. Doctors are concerned that Jeremy's history of cancer could affect his recovery, while the emergency team tries to determine the full extent of Patricia's spinal injury. Andrew, 45, is in resus after falling three metres from a ladder at work and seriously fracturing his ankle. Medics need to re-align his bones before emergency surgery

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: Miquita and Andi Oliver, Mo Gilligan with Babatunde Aléshé, Jamie Carragher and Micah Richards, Nick Grimshaw and his niece Liv, Big Zuu, Hyder and Tubsey, Shaun Ryder and Bez, Clare Balding and Alice Arnold, and Denise van Outen and Duncan James comment on the week's TV. Programmes discussed include Glastonbury, Hijack, A Wright Family Holiday, Cocaine Bear, Below Deck Sailing Yacht, Puzzling and Antiques Roadshow. First shown in June 2023

programme.title: In the Footsteps of Killers
programme.desc: Emilia Fox and Professor David Wilson investigate the 1993 murder of 42-year-old Bulic Forsythe, a manager at Lambeth Council, who was savagely beaten in his own home in Clapham, London, before the property was set ablaze

programme.title: Wonders of the World I Can't See
programme.desc: Chris McCausland and Liza Tarbuck head to Canada to experience the majestic natural marvel that is Niagara Falls. It's the only wonder in the series that makes a noise, so Chris is especially excited to be here. The pair explore the wider Canadian cultural landscape of axe throwing, bushcraft and poutine before heading into the heart of the falls for an emotional final experience

programme.title: Extraordinary Escapes with Sandi Toksvig
programme.desc: Sandi is joined by comedian and author Rosie Jones for a journey round the Midlands exploring the best staycation retreats they have to offer. The pair begin in Rutland where they stay at the Rocket Lodge, an eco-build made of upcycled grain silos that boasts a wood-fired hot-tub, a circular kitchen and a disco bathroom. In the sand dunes on a strip of the Lincolnshire coastline, the duo stay in a rebooted 70s beach house called Sandy Feet where Sandi learns that 'Netflix and chill' doesn't mean what she thinks it does. They end their trip close to the Welsh border on the Walcot Estate in a 200-year-old hideaway known as the Wheelwright's shop that once lived 20 miles away but was dismantled and transported piece by piece before being rebuilt to look exactly the same

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to Flamangos restaurant in Whitehouse, New Jersey, where he tries to help the mother-and-daughter owners turn around their struggling business's fortunes. He faces a struggle because parent Adelle has a bad relationship with her staff and is disappointed by the resident chef, leaving Gordon with the added challenge of changing her attitude

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples from Blackburn compete to put on the best dinner party, with a halibut starter served in tinfoil, an eager-to-please pair of hosts, and a relaxed curry dinner

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Uncut
programme.desc: Joe Wilkinson, Ellie Taylor, Natalie Cassidy and Gabby Logan join captains Jon Richardson and Sean Lock on an extended edition of the irreverent panel show, hosted by Jimmy Carr

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert is elated to be signed up by a modelling agency, convinced fame and wealth are just around the corner - but his dreams of success prove short-lived. Comedy, starring Ray Romano and Brad Garrett

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: A stranger reveals to the Barones that Frank used to be his mentor - much to the bemusement of Ray and Robert, who find it hard to believe their father could ever have inspired anyone. Comedy, starring Ray Romano, Peter Boyle and Brad Garrett

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert and Ray end up with the mother of all guilt trips when they decide not to help Marie with a home project so they can land a prime spot on the golf course

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: Pilot (The One Where Monica Gets a Room-mate)

programme.sub-title: The One with the Sonogram at the End

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Monica shows off her new boyfriend to the rest of the group, Chandler decides to take up smoking again and Phoebe makes a gruesome discovery that leads to her receiving a windfall. Starring Courteney Cox, Matthew Perry and Lisa Kudrow

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: The girls end up breaking out binoculars in order to catch a glimpse of a good-looking neighbour with White House connections after accidentally receiving a pizza that he ordered, while Joey and Chandler take Ross to a ice hockey game to keep his mind busy

programme.title: Modern Family

programme.desc: Bart plays a prank on Mrs Krabappel, but it backfires badly and results in her being fired, leaving him feeling so guilty that he resolves to do everything he can to get her reinstated - even if it means discrediting her replacement

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Part two of two. The chef continues his quest to transform the fortunes of the Burger Kitchen in Los Angeles, where tensions were running high because owner Alan Saffron had spent his son's entire inheritance on the struggling restaurant. Alan gets a wake-up call from internet critics, who he believes are trying to shut him down

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.sub-title: I Do, Deep in the Heart of Austin
programme.desc: Ten singles from Austin, Texas are ready to marry complete strangers in the ultimate quest for love. The first two couples say I do, sparks fly for one pair, but first impressions falter when one newly-wed clashes with their in-laws and another faces a shocking twist with their new family

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil enjoys sharing the secrets of the estate agent's life with Luke and Manny's classmates on school career day - only for things to turn ugly when his rival Gil Thorpe turns up. Jay's dream of being a writer looks destined to fail as he struggles to complete his book, while Lily's first encounter with the Tooth Fairy proves lucrative when a drunken Cam accidentally slips a $100 bill under her pillow

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Mitch's ex, successful doctor Teddy, invites the entire family to a fundraising event at the local roller rink - and when Cam realises how popular the host is, his jealousy soon gets out of hand. Claire tries to keep her distance from Jay to avoid talk of a job offer, while Phil has a novel way of teaching Gloria to skate and Haley gives Alex tips on flirting

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The family is recruited and brainwashed by a religious cult - except for Marge, who resorts to desperate measures to snap the others out of it

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart and Lisa go on a school trip, but Otto accidentally drives the bus off a bridge and into the water, where it washes up on a deserted island - leaving the schoolchildren to fend for themselves. Meanwhile, Homer decides to set up his own internet business. With the guest voice of James Earl Jones

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge goes on the offensive and plans a protest against a combat sport that has captivated Springfield's male population. When promoter Chett Englebrecht hears of her campaign, he challenges her to a fight - and agrees to shut down his entire operation if she beats him

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Dracula, the Wolf Man, the Mummy and Frankenstein's monster gatecrash a Halloween party at 742 Evergreen Terrace. Bart and Lisa plot revenge on their teachers in a Hitchcock-inspired short story, but end up turning on each another

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: For the first time in his career, Jake has a growing number of cases he just can't seem to solve, and the other detectives worry his run of bad luck will rub off on them. Holt asks Amy to take charge of a community outreach programme for at-risk youths, and Boyle helps Jeffords with a tough personal assignment. Comedy, starring Andy Samberg and Andre Braugher

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jake meets an attractive medical examiner at a crime scene, but annoys his colleagues when his attempts to get together with her cause a hold-up with an autopsy report. Meanwhile, Amy discovers Jeffords has some hidden talents when the police sketch artist goes off sick

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Christmas has arrived, providing a typically chaotic time for the Pritchett-Dunphys, as Jay takes Manny to chop down a tree, Mitchell rushes to finish his shopping and Cam and Lily get into the holiday spirit at a charity event. Meanwhile, Gloria has a visit from her mum. Directed by Breaking Bad star Bryan Cranston

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil tries to share his love of dancing with unenthusiastic son Luke and Claire struggles to hide her frustration while teaching an overly cautious Alex to drive. Mitch and Cam enter the cut-throat world of wedding venue booking

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Gloria settles a score with another mum during a school visit, Mitch sets out to prove he is more environmentally aware than his neighbour, Manny and Luke have a double date with twins, and Alex goes to see a therapist. Jesse Eisenberg and Jane Krakowski guest star

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Jay is troubled when best pal Shorty reveals that he and his wife are moving away. Phil and Claire take Haley out to discuss her future, while Mitchell and Cam take a break from all the wedding planning to enjoy a romantic meal - only to interrupt a couple's surprise engagement dinner. Chazz Palminteri and Jennifer Tilly guest star

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer and Marge try to breathe new life into their relationship by canoodling in public places, while Bart and Lisa use Grampa's metal detector to hunt for hidden treasure

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Blood-curdling tales from America's favourite family in another Halloween special. The spooky stories feature an island inhabited by 'manimals', plus tales about an army of Homer clones and zombie cowboys

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: How I Spent My Strummer Vacation
programme.desc: Homer is asked to help the Rolling Stones with a forthcoming benefit gig, filling his head with dreams of rock 'n' roll stardom. Unfortunately, they only want him to stand in as a roadie. Featuring the voices of Mick Jagger, Keith Richards, Lenny Kravitz, Tom Petty and Elvis Costello

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: Bart v Lisa v the Third Grade
programme.desc: Lisa is thrilled to learn she has been moved up a grade at school - until she discovers Bart's poor performance has caused him to be demoted to the same class. Tensions inevitably develop between the pair, but a crisis during a field trip teaches them the value of working together. With the guest voice of Tony Bennett

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: At the police station, Charlie is feeling the pressure as he's pushed for answers on what caused him to be distracted. At the Loft, sick of Jenson and his remarks, Warren gives him money to leave the village. Frankie apologises to Caleb admitting she does like him and plans on doing the right thing

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge takes a job at the power plant to help with the cost of repairing the family home, which is sliding off its foundations. With the voice of Tom Jones

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.sub-title: Don't Mess with My Texas Wedding
programme.desc: Four more singles prepare to meet their matches at the altar, but it's not the first time some of them have said 'I do'. The two couples who've already tied the knot spend their first night together

programme.title: Celebs Go Dating
programme.desc: A very hungover David is grilled at the agency about his passionate date with Anthony, and Gabby heads out on the most important date of her journey so far. Lucinda's choices involve magic and vikings, and James' past might be about to catch up with him

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on the final episode of Peaky Blinders, as well as Made in Chelsea, Gordon Ramsay's Future Food Stars, Holidaying with Jane McDonald, Scam Interceptors and the ITV News about the energy price hikes

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.sub-title: Best Naughty Bits: The Good, the Bad and the Kinky
programme.desc: Another romp through the Naked Attraction archive, this time focusing on the people doing the choosing - from those that it seemed butter would not melt to the ones who revealed their darkest secrets. Highlights include the polyamorous couple picking a date to the time the bodies were covered in whipped cream, strawberries and custard

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Diners include Sherry, a 65-year-old dominatrix looking for romance. She hopes chartered surveyor and t'ai chi enthusiast John might be the man for her. Meanwhile, Hannah, 40, is looking for a man who shares her love of adventure. Could 42-year-old Christmas tree farmer Rob be her Mr Right?

programme.title: Celebs Go Dating
programme.desc: A very hungover David is grilled at the agency about his passionate date with Anthony, and Gabby heads out on the most important date of her journey so far. Lucinda's choices involve magic and vikings, and James' past might be about to catch up with him

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers

Irreverent panel show, hosted by Jimmy Carr

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jon Richardson and Joe Wilkinson take on Lee Mack and Katherine Ryan in the comedy words-and-numbers game, while the Brett Domino Trio join Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner. Hosted by Jimmy Carr, with Rachel Riley looking after the numbers and letters

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Andy Wirth - the CEO of a California ski resort - goes undercover to learn more about his company's working practices as he prepares to merge an existing operation with a new acquisition

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Andy Wiederhorn, CEO of Los Angeles-based fast food restaurant Fatburger, goes incognito among his employees in order to learn more about his business that has evolved from a late-night hangout for musicians in the 1950s to an international success story

programme.title: Property Brothers: Buying and Selling
programme.desc: In the fifth season, more couples put their homes in the bros' hands. Can Jonathan and Drew raise the roof off of dilapidated, draughty and dingy digs? And while Jonathan takes on a budget-friendly reno, Drew can't figure out if Jessica and Taylorare looking for one house, or two?Short:Siblings Jessica and Jason have lived together for 16 years. programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples compete for the cash prize of £1,000 in the west of Scotland, including married couple Gavin and Johanna, who start things off with a loosely Italian-themed menu

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Perfectionist Michelle and her husband, Bryan Adams tribute singer Russell, host first in Cheltenham, on a night when a budding bromance starts to develop. On night two Calum and fiancee Lydia have a rustic theme. While their food doesn't seem to quite hit the mark, Calum's impromptu am dram performances do. Finally, Jane and Paul's menu celebrates Jane's favourite things, but gets mixed reviews

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: A groom-to-be from London is given £12,000 to arrange every detail of his civil partnership ceremony, but questions arise over whether his cabaret theme might prove too much for his unwitting partner. Meanwhile, the best man's antics threaten to derail the plans

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: A Newquay surfer is given £12,000 to plan his nuptials and give his partner of four years the wedding of her dreams. However, his beach-based ideas threaten to derail the big day, and nine enthusiastic bridesmaids look set to dominate the proceedings

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Travis Boersma, co-founder and president of one of the largest privately owned drive-through coffee shop chains in America, goes undercover to learn whether the culture he and his brother hoped to implement is being upheld by the company's front-line employees

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Eric Casaburi, a former undercover boss, invites six other employers who also appeared incognito on the show to talk about their experiences of the programme at a restaurant. However, little do they realise that Eric is going to try to fool them by appearing as a waiter. Featuring Kat Cole, Paul Damico, Andy Wiederhorn, Sheldon Yellen, Anthony Wedo and Jane Grote Abell

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to the Prohibition Grille in Everett, Washington, where he meets belly dancer-turned-restaurateur Rishi Brown, who is making all the wrong moves with her business. Distracted from the task of improving her menu by performing for customers, she's oblivious to the disastrous dishes being served from her own kitchen

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Nashville, Tennessee, the spiritual home of country music, but his visit begins on a sour note at Chappy's Cajun restaurant. Chef John Chapman's careless methods have damaged his reputation, but he blames the local clientele rather than his less-than-appetising food and disturbing kitchen practices. Can Gordon get through to this stubborn owner and save the eatery from disaster?

programme.title: Property Brothers: Buying and Selling
programme.desc: In the fifth season, more couples put their homes in the bros' hands. But the fun and games are over as Jonathan updates the interiors and Drew deals with a constantly increasing budget

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three rival duos compete in Glasgow, where highlights include a bit of karaoke, a game of guess that tune and one menu inspired by moments in the couple's relationship

programme.title: Taskmaster Bleeped
programme.desc: No-naughty-bits version. Taskmaster Greg Davies has to find a way to award points after watching Nick Mohammed sheath a water bottle with a sock, Joanne McNally tie a noose for a soft toy, and Steve Pemberton repeatedly express a hankering for pancakes. Meanwhile, Little Alex Horne jots down all the facts and figures as John Robins puts his faith in honey and Sophie Willan attempts to take flight

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: Will plans to celebrate his birthday with a grown-up dinner, but his friends face a dilemma when they discover the event clashes with a more popular party. They end up gatecrashing the rival gathering, only to find that Simon's French exchange student steals the limelight

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: Will tries to reinvent the boys' image by taking them clubbing around London, but Simon is unsure whether to go until Carli shows an interest in the outing. programme.title: Tattoo Fixers

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: John Wilson, the President and Chief Operating Officer of Rollins Incorporated - the parent company of eight pest-control firms including flagship brand Orkin - goes undercover. He poses as a contestant on a reality TV competition who is trying to win money for his own business, and works alongside his employees to make sure the organisation is heading for another century of keeping homes rodent-free

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Randy DeWitt, the CEO and co-founder of bar and grill chain Twin Peaks, goes undercover to find out whether the company's culture is keeping up with its rapid growth. Posing as a contestant on a reality TV competition, he works among his own staff

programme.title: Property Brothers: Buying and Selling
programme.desc: In the fifth season, more couples put their homes in the bros' hands. Can Jonathan and Drew raise the roof off of dilapidated, draughty and dingy digs? Lisa, Chris, their kids and Grandma move into a motorhome as Jonathan renovates their log-cabin interiors and illegal lattice stairs. Drew warns that their long wish list must be chopped down

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Big kids Wizz and Luke kick off the week in Cambridgeshire with a children's party-themed night complete with food in colourful cardboard boxes. On night two demanding Diana and Mark host with a fine dining affair. Finally, Ed and Steve, who are usually smiley, start to feel the pressure - although their guests are in awe of their enormous trifle

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples from east Kent host dinner parties, with the highest-scoring duo winning the cash prize of £1,000. Outspoken estate agent Sean and his girlfriend Beth kick off the competition with a Welsh-themed menu. Day two sees Marcus and Miguel lay on a Malaysian feast, but Sean's teasing of his girlfriend steals the limelight. Finally it's Geoff and Jill's chance to shine with their hippy vibe and Indian themed menu, so it's a battle of the curries. But whether their blend of spices and loved-up atmosphere is enough to bag them the grand remains to be seen

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Bedfordshire man James is given the funds to provide his fiancee Mercy with her dream wedding, and plans to incorporate her Nigerian heritage into the ceremony. However, his laid-back attitude threatens to derail the process, and the pressure is on from the would-be bride's family to make sure each of the African nation's traditions is upheld during the nuptials

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Nathan from Kidderminster, Worcestershire, arranges a farm-themed wedding for his fiancee Nicky, but quickly ends up out of his depth as he tries to navigate the complex worlds of bridal dresses and women's lingerie. Fortunately, he finds himself on more familiar ground as he prepares to build his ideal reception venue

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Shane Evans, COO and co-founder of massage therapy chain Massage Heights, poses as a contestant on a TV reality show who is trying fund her own business. After spending nine years moulding the company, she decides to find out first-hand how her retreats are doing so she can fix potential problems before expanding the business to 300 new locations

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Bruce 'Two Dogs' Bozsum, the chairman of a Native American gaming and entertainment empire, goes undercover among his own employees to learn how he might be able to improve his organisation and ensure it flourishes for generations to come. He poses as a reality TV contestant who is trying to win funds to start up his own business, before revealing his true identity and offering rewards to some of the memorable people he has met

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Scottsdale, Arizona, where he meets husband-and-wife bistro owners Samy and Amy Bouzaglo, who reveal a shocking contempt for customer feedback. The chef faces the biggest challenge of the series to save Amy's Baking Company, but can he get through to this defiant pair?

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: A look at what happened after Gordon Ramsay headed to Scottsdale, Arizona, where he met husband-and-wife bistro owners Samy and Amy Bouzaglo, who revealed a shocking contempt for customer feedback. The chef faced the biggest challenge of the series to save Amy's Baking Company - and a media furore unfolded after the episode was broadcast

programme.title: Property Brothers: Buying and Selling
programme.desc: In series six, more properties are ready for a new lease on life. Can our bros leave their homeowners in high spirits as they take their architectural ambitions to the next level? Can the brothers turn their unsellable property into a place to scream and shout about?Short:Expectant parents Catherine and Nick are ready for a big move but are having no luck. Finally, Shannon and Max host a night of favourite flavours taking everyone 'around the world'

programme.title: Taskmaster Bleeped

Why does Sophie Willan love to balance items on her head? Can John Robins make formula milk? What does Nick Mohammed think is going to happen to those eggs? And, most intriguingly, why is Joanne McNally sniffing Little Alex Horne's beard? Taskmaster Greg Davies reacts with characteristic robustness to the cast's efforts to impress him

programme.desc: 'Deadly' (aka David) found fame with his UK garage crew, and though he may be confident on stage, he's shy and retiring with the ladies. She's an amateur magician with a few dating tricks up her sleeve

Thirty-five-year-old amateur pole dancer Abi from Colchester is looking for fun times with someone silly who can send her heart into a spin

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Highlights of the year's episodes, featuring memorable appearances by the Siddiquis, Giles and Mary, Jenny and Lee, Ellie and Izzi, Marcus and Mica, and Amira and Iqra as they share their opinions and lively discussions based on the best and worst TV of 2021. On the last night, John and Katy aim to spread the love among the group by serving up the same menu that they had for their wedding six weeks earlier, while John wears his wedding suit and Katy wears half her wedding dress

programme.desc: The chef heads to floundering soul food restaurant Blackberry's in Plainfield, New Jersey, but struggles to get his message across to indomitable owner Shelley. programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay is in New Jersey to help Rose Leone, who spent two years in a coma and came out of hospital to learn her son Michael had run her once-thriving Italian restaurant into the ground. With a menu of more than 126 dishes, the quality of the food is suffering, and even the chefs refuse to eat their own creations

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride: Revisited
programme.desc: Groom Simon is joined by his best man Anthony to reflect on his Las Vegas wedding, watching the dramatic events unfold on screen

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil and Claire visit hospital, where they get an unexpected - and frightening - glimpse of the future, while Mitch, Cam and Sofia take Lily to a Vietnamese restaurant to introduce her to her Asian roots. Jay struggles to put his prejudices aside when he accompanies Manny on a tour of a prospective private school

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire and Cam try to sell the house they bought, but when the estate agent's negotiations fall through, they are forced to woo a potential buyer and seal the deal themselves. Tensions bubble over at the Pritchetts' when Javier drops by with his new girlfriend, with Gloria taking an immediate dislike to her ex's latest flame - especially when the woman strikes up a bond with Manny

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer rents a Western for the family to watch, but is disappointed when it turns out to be a musical, so the family reminds him of musical highlights from past episodes. Featuring the guest voice of George Harrison

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: A sleazy carnival worker and his son lose their jobs thanks to Homer, and end up moving in with the Simpson family - whose home they proceed to take over and completely wreck. With the guest voice of Jim Varney

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is cast in the title role of Everyman, a superhero movie penned by Comic Book Guy, but struggles with the exercise and diet regimen required to get in shape for the part. With the guest voice of Seth Rogen

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart plays a prank on Mrs Krabappel, but it backfires badly and results in her being fired, leaving him feeling so guilty that he resolves to do everything he can to get her reinstated - even if it means discrediting her replacement

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Detective Jake Peralta and his eclectic group of colleagues at Brooklyn's 99th Precinct are used to having a commanding officer who doesn't make them work too hard or follow the rules too closely. That all changes when tightly wound Captain Ray Holt takes over, determined to make the dysfunctional squad into the best in the borough. Pilot episode of the American comedy, starring Andy Samberg and Andre Braugher

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jake is assigned to a minor graffiti case by Captain Holt as punishment for turning up late for work, but the investigation becomes a major headache when the vandal's identity is revealed. Meanwhile, Gina's psychic friend Carlene visits the precinct to help with a case, and upsets Charles with a prediction about his romantic life. American comedy, starring Andy Samberg

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Manny is not happy when Gloria hires a male nanny and it turns out Jay isn't that keen either. Phil is worried about his dad Frank, and embarks on a mission to help him get his groove back, while Pepper pops by to plan Mitch and Cam's wedding, but when talk turns to unicorns, the pair attempt to rein their pal in. Nathan Lane guest stars

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: A family trip to the school fair proves eventful for Phil and Claire, while Haley's relaxing day by the pool is interrupted by an awkward encounter with 'manny' Andy and Jay is unimpressed when Gloria signs him up for 'cop duties'

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Jay and Claire head to ClosetCon'13, a trade show for the closet industry, providing the perfect opportunity for Phil to find out what his father-in-law is storing in his secret room. Cam takes Lily and Mitch to the Tucker family farm, though he does not bargain on a visit from Grams (guest star Ann Guilbert), who is known for her homophobia. Comedy, starring Ed O'Neill and Julie Bowen

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Cam is determined to lead the Dolphins to victory in a big football game, showing no mercy to the opposition despite the fact they are playing with an unexpected disadvantage. Off the field, Phil tries to teach his kids about optimism, but nothing seems to be going his way. Meanwhile, at Pritchett Closets & Blinds, Claire is desperate to prove to her colleagues that she is more than just the boss's daughter. Starring Ed O'Neill and Julie Bowen

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer acquires a pet monkey to help him with his chores, while Bart begins co-hosting a children's news programme with Lisa - and decides to take a leaf out of Kent Brockman's book, cynically concentrating on human interest stories in a bid to boost his own popularity

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is appointed Springfield's new sanitation commissioner, but finds it so hard to keep his elaborate election promises that he is forced to spend the year's budget allocation in his first month in charge. Featuring the guest voices of U2 and Steve Martin

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Two company executives hire Homer to climb Springfield's most treacherous mountain, the ominously named Murderhorn, as a promotional stunt for their energy bar product. With the guest voice of Brendan Fraser

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart uses industrial adhesive to stick assorted novelty items to his face, while Lisa persuades Homer to let her visit the museum - but takes the wrong bus and becomes lost in an unfamiliar part of Springfield

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Guilt begins to consume Charlie and he admits to Frankie that he's ready to hand himself in. The morning after Ste and Rex's wedding, Leela finds the Hutchinson teenangers spiralling with Tony absent and she offers them support. Distracting himself from recent events, Tony attempts to fix the broken oven at the Hutch

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart misbehaves once too often, prompting Homer and Marge to impose a terrible punishment - banning him from ever going to see the new feature-length Itchy and Scratchy film, and standing firm despite his constant pleas

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.sub-title: I Do, Deep in the Heart of Austin
programme.desc: Ten singles from Austin, Texas are ready to marry complete strangers in the ultimate quest for love. The first two couples say I do, sparks fly for one pair, but first impressions falter when one newly-wed clashes with their in-laws and another faces a shocking twist with their new family

programme.title: Celebs Go Dating
programme.desc: Professor Green has a turbulent second date with radio presenter Claira, PK Humble gets to grips with sheep farmer Ellen, and David Potts has a blind date with underwear model Anthony, who's soon posing in his pants

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on shows including Bridgerton, Gordon Ramsay's Future Food Stars, Dynasties II, The Great Big Tiny Design Challenge with Sandi Toksvig, Starstruck, Joanna Lumley's Great Cities of the World and This Morning. Plus, ITV News coverage of Will Smith attack of Chris Rock at the Oscars

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: A look back at the times when what started as great chemistry in the studio ended in dating disaster, reliving memorable arguments and cringeworthy moments, including bisexual Leah from the third series, who brought her pet dog Kush to the studio to help her pick her partner. There is also a reunion between Cathy from Hertfordshire and her date Andy

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Diners include Sherry, a 65-year-old dominatrix looking for romance. She hopes chartered surveyor and t'ai chi enthusiast John might be the man for her. Meanwhile, Hannah, 40, is looking for a man who shares her love of adventure. Could 42-year-old Christmas tree farmer Rob be her Mr Right?

programme.title: Celebs Go Dating
programme.desc: Professor Green has a turbulent second date with radio presenter Claira, PK Humble gets to grips with sheep farmer Ellen, and David Potts has a blind date with underwear model Anthony, who's soon posing in his pants

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef heads to floundering soul food restaurant Blackberry's in Plainfield, New Jersey, but struggles to get his message across to indomitable owner Shelley. Her refusal to deal with the truth comes to a head when Gordon finds a dead mouse in the doorway, prompting him to step up his efforts to change her ways

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam is excited about introducing Carmen to his family, but is shocked by a past incident between her and one of his siblings. Geoff helps Pop-Pop to improve his room-mate status

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Lou and Linda spend some quality time with Muriel. Barry implements superstitious protocols that the family must follow when the Flyers make it to the Stanley Cup finals

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride: Revisited
programme.desc: Groom Simon is joined by his best man Anthony to reflect on his Las Vegas wedding, watching the dramatic events unfold on screen

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Diane reflects on her life while the Osbornes and Keanes feud downstairs in the Dog. Wanting to make every moment count, the Hutchinsons leave the customers to it and join Diane

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Guilt begins to consume Charlie and he admits to Frankie that he's ready to hand himself in. The morning after Ste and Rex's wedding, Leela finds the Hutchinson teenangers spiralling with Tony absent and she offers them support. Distracting himself from recent events, Tony attempts to fix the broken oven at the Hutch

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos on the themes of food and animals

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In East Anglia, hip-hop enthusiasts Christine and Terry provide a hearty menu for their guests, before allotment owners Tim and Amanda host with a menu dedicated to their home-grown fruit and veg. Finally, Megan and Matt - who rarely spend time together in the kitchen - set off their fire alarm and have difficulty pulling things together and getting any food to the table

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: First of a two-part special in which Gordon Ramsay heads to the Burger Kitchen in Los Angeles, where tensions are running high because owner Alan Saffron has spent his son's entire inheritance on the struggling restaurant. To make matters worse, the kitchen is run by a chef called David Blaine who shares nothing of his famous namesake's magic when it comes to cooking - and whose threatening behaviour regularly gets him into trouble

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Part two of two. The chef continues his quest to transform the fortunes of the Burger Kitchen in Los Angeles, where tensions were running high because owner Alan Saffron had spent his son's entire inheritance on the struggling restaurant. Alan gets a wake-up call from internet critics, who he believes are trying to shut him down

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.sub-title: I Do, Deep in the Heart of Austin
programme.desc: Ten singles from Austin, Texas are ready to marry complete strangers in the ultimate quest for love. The first two couples say I do, sparks fly for one pair, but first impressions falter when one newly-wed clashes with their in-laws and another faces a shocking twist with their new family

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil enjoys sharing the secrets of the estate agent's life with Luke and Manny's classmates on school career day - only for things to turn ugly when his rival Gil Thorpe turns up. Jay's dream of being a writer looks destined to fail as he struggles to complete his book, while Lily's first encounter with the Tooth Fairy proves lucrative when a drunken Cam accidentally slips a $100 bill under her pillow

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Mitch's ex, successful doctor Teddy, invites the entire family to a fundraising event at the local roller rink - and when Cam realises how popular the host is, his jealousy soon gets out of hand. Claire tries to keep her distance from Jay to avoid talk of a job offer, while Phil has a novel way of teaching Gloria to skate and Haley gives Alex tips on flirting

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The family is recruited and brainwashed by a religious cult - except for Marge, who resorts to desperate measures to snap the others out of it

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart and Lisa go on a school trip, but Otto accidentally drives the bus off a bridge and into the water, where it washes up on a deserted island - leaving the schoolchildren to fend for themselves. Meanwhile, Homer decides to set up his own internet business. With the guest voice of James Earl Jones

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge goes on the offensive and plans a protest against a combat sport that has captivated Springfield's male population. When promoter Chett Englebrecht hears of her campaign, he challenges her to a fight - and agrees to shut down his entire operation if she beats him

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Dracula, the Wolf Man, the Mummy and Frankenstein's monster gatecrash a Halloween party at 742 Evergreen Terrace. Bart and Lisa plot revenge on their teachers in a Hitchcock-inspired short story, but end up turning on each another

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: For the first time in his career, Jake has a growing number of cases he just can't seem to solve, and the other detectives worry his run of bad luck will rub off on them. Holt asks Amy to take charge of a community outreach programme for at-risk youths, and Boyle helps Jeffords with a tough personal assignment. Comedy, starring Andy Samberg and Andre Braugher

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jake meets an attractive medical examiner at a crime scene, but annoys his colleagues when his attempts to get together with her cause a hold-up with an autopsy report. Meanwhile, Amy discovers Jeffords has some hidden talents when the police sketch artist goes off sick

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Christmas has arrived, providing a typically chaotic time for the Pritchett-Dunphys, as Jay takes Manny to chop down a tree, Mitchell rushes to finish his shopping and Cam and Lily get into the holiday spirit at a charity event. Meanwhile, Gloria has a visit from her mum. Directed by Breaking Bad star Bryan Cranston

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil tries to share his love of dancing with unenthusiastic son Luke and Claire struggles to hide her frustration while teaching an overly cautious Alex to drive. Mitch and Cam enter the cut-throat world of wedding venue booking

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Gloria settles a score with another mum during a school visit, Mitch sets out to prove he is more environmentally aware than his neighbour, Manny and Luke have a double date with twins, and Alex goes to see a therapist. Jesse Eisenberg and Jane Krakowski guest star

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Jay is troubled when best pal Shorty reveals that he and his wife are moving away. Phil and Claire take Haley out to discuss her future, while Mitchell and Cam take a break from all the wedding planning to enjoy a romantic meal - only to interrupt a couple's surprise engagement dinner. Chazz Palminteri and Jennifer Tilly guest star

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer and Marge try to breathe new life into their relationship by canoodling in public places, while Bart and Lisa use Grampa's metal detector to hunt for hidden treasure

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Blood-curdling tales from America's favourite family in another Halloween special. The spooky stories feature an island inhabited by 'manimals', plus tales about an army of Homer clones and zombie cowboys

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: How I Spent My Strummer Vacation
programme.desc: Homer is asked to help the Rolling Stones with a forthcoming benefit gig, filling his head with dreams of rock 'n' roll stardom. Unfortunately, they only want him to stand in as a roadie. Featuring the voices of Mick Jagger, Keith Richards, Lenny Kravitz, Tom Petty and Elvis Costello

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: Bart v Lisa v the Third Grade
programme.desc: Lisa is thrilled to learn she has been moved up a grade at school - until she discovers Bart's poor performance has caused him to be demoted to the same class. Tensions inevitably develop between the pair, but a crisis during a field trip teaches them the value of working together. With the guest voice of Tony Bennett

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: At the police station, Charlie is feeling the pressure as he's pushed for answers on what caused him to be distracted. At the Loft, sick of Jenson and his remarks, Warren gives him money to leave the village. Frankie apologises to Caleb admitting she does like him and plans on doing the right thing

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge takes a job at the power plant to help with the cost of repairing the family home, which is sliding off its foundations. With the voice of Tom Jones

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.sub-title: Don't Mess with My Texas Wedding
programme.desc: Four more singles prepare to meet their matches at the altar, but it's not the first time some of them have said 'I do'. The two couples who've already tied the knot spend their first night together

programme.title: Celebs Go Dating
programme.desc: A very hungover David is grilled at the agency about his passionate date with Anthony, and Gabby heads out on the most important date of her journey so far. Lucinda's choices involve magic and vikings, and James' past might be about to catch up with him

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on the final episode of Peaky Blinders, as well as Made in Chelsea, Gordon Ramsay's Future Food Stars, Holidaying with Jane McDonald, Scam Interceptors and the ITV News about the energy price hikes

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.sub-title: Best Naughty Bits: Breaking Nude Ground
programme.desc: A look back at the times that the unique dating show has broken new ground, featuring stories from across the spectrum of gender and sexuality. There is also a catch-up with Lauren Harries, celebrated transsexual woman and the first celebrity to appear in a pod, and Josh, who was on the third series, to find out if he is still a virgin

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Singletons include political activist Lettie, who is 23 and looking for her intellectual equal, but despite being clued-up on politics, she is clueless on love. Meanwhile, octogenarian Doreen is not ready to give up on love and wants a man to keep her on her toes. Her date is 86-year-old author James

programme.title: Celebs Go Dating
programme.desc: A very hungover David is grilled at the agency about his passionate date with Anthony, and Gabby heads out on the most important date of her journey so far. Lucinda's choices involve magic and vikings, and James' past might be about to catch up with him

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.sub-title: Don't Mess with My Texas Wedding
programme.desc: Four more singles prepare to meet their matches at the altar, but it's not the first time some of them have said 'I do'. The two couples who've already tied the knot spend their first night together

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: At Pop-Pop's old apartment, Adam discovers an item from the past and realises they have more in common than he thought

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly learns that the complicated world of adult relationships is filled with minefields when she opens her mind to dating. And Barry discovers a new passion

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay is in New Jersey to help Rose Leone, who spent two years in a coma and came out of hospital to learn her son Michael had run her once-thriving Italian restaurant into the ground. With a menu of more than 126 dishes, the quality of the food is suffering, and even the chefs refuse to eat their own creations

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: 'Deadly' (aka David) found fame with his UK garage crew, and though he may be confident on stage, he's shy and retiring with the ladies. Can he bring his A-game when he meet teaching assistant Helen? Other diners include rock fan Anthony, who meets retired nurse and fellow northerner Barbara. She's an amateur magician with a few dating tricks up her sleeve

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Forty-two-year-old logistics manager Luke from Chichester is back in the UK after seven years working in the Middle East and is looking for a woman to reinvigorate his love life. Thirty-five-year-old amateur pole dancer Abi from Colchester is looking for fun times with someone silly who can send her heart into a spin

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Highlights of the year's episodes, featuring memorable appearances by the Siddiquis, Giles and Mary, Jenny and Lee, Ellie and Izzi, Marcus and Mica, and Amira and Iqra as they share their opinions and lively discussions based on the best and worst TV of 2021. The shows featured include I Can See Your Voice, Mastermind, Nadiya, Ready to Mingle, Line of Duty, The Mating Game, Petrol News, Sex Actually with Alice Levine, Strictly Come Dancing, Squid Game, An Audience with Adele, Headspace Guide to Sleep, Vigil, Life Drawing Live, Sex, Love & Goop, and Coronation Street

programme.title: Hollyoaks Omnibus
programme.desc: Frankie wants to come clean to Caleb, while Charlie's crumbling under the weight of his lies, and the village gathers for Rex and Ste's wedding. Diane reflects on her life in Hollyoaks as the Osbornes and Keanes feud downstairs in The Dog. Wanting to make every moment count, the Hutchinsons leave the customers to it and join Diane

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Charlie is crumbling under the weight of his lies, the villagers gather for Rex and Ste's wedding, and Diane is determined to create a day of happy memories for her family

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Diane reflects on her life while the Osbornes and Keanes feud downstairs in the Dog. Wanting to make every moment count, the Hutchinsons leave the customers to it and join Diane

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos featuring sports of the lawnmower, motorcycle and bicycle variety

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Cambridge, the first hosts are 23-year-old stable owner Alice and her feisty boyfriend Ollie, who reveals that he helped to hunt and butcher the deer they're serving for their main course. Travel specialists Gareth and Hihine try to throw a more civilised evening, based around a generations-old family Asian menu. On the last night, John and Katy aim to spread the love among the group by serving up the same menu that they had for their wedding six weeks earlier, while John wears his wedding suit and Katy wears half her wedding dress

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride: Revisited
programme.desc: Groom Simon is joined by his best man Anthony to reflect on his Las Vegas wedding, watching the dramatic events unfold on screen

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil and Claire visit hospital, where they get an unexpected - and frightening - glimpse of the future, while Mitch, Cam and Sofia take Lily to a Vietnamese restaurant to introduce her to her Asian roots. Jay struggles to put his prejudices aside when he accompanies Manny on a tour of a prospective private school

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire and Cam try to sell the house they bought, but when the estate agent's negotiations fall through, they are forced to woo a potential buyer and seal the deal themselves. Tensions bubble over at the Pritchetts' when Javier drops by with his new girlfriend, with Gloria taking an immediate dislike to her ex's latest flame - especially when the woman strikes up a bond with Manny

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer rents a Western for the family to watch, but is disappointed when it turns out to be a musical, so the family reminds him of musical highlights from past episodes. Featuring the guest voice of George Harrison

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: A sleazy carnival worker and his son lose their jobs thanks to Homer, and end up moving in with the Simpson family - whose home they proceed to take over and completely wreck. With the guest voice of Jim Varney

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is cast in the title role of Everyman, a superhero movie penned by Comic Book Guy, but struggles with the exercise and diet regimen required to get in shape for the part. With the guest voice of Seth Rogen

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart plays a prank on Mrs Krabappel, but it backfires badly and results in her being fired, leaving him feeling so guilty that he resolves to do everything he can to get her reinstated - even if it means discrediting her replacement

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Detective Jake Peralta and his eclectic group of colleagues at Brooklyn's 99th Precinct are used to having a commanding officer who doesn't make them work too hard or follow the rules too closely. That all changes when tightly wound Captain Ray Holt takes over, determined to make the dysfunctional squad into the best in the borough. Pilot episode of the American comedy, starring Andy Samberg and Andre Braugher
