The teenage oddball tries to make the best of his changing circumstances, while putting all his skills to the task of helping his new best friend win the class presidency. Comedy, starring Jon Heder, Efren Ramirez and Haylie Duff

programme.title: Mamma Mia! (2008)
programme.desc: A former member of a singing trio, now running a hotel on a Greek island, is reunited with her old bandmates for her daughter's wedding - but is surprised when three of her old flames also show up unexpectedly. The three men have been invited by the bride, who wants to find out which one of them is her father. Musical comedy, with a soundtrack of Abba songs, starring Meryl Streep, Pierce Brosnan, Julie Walters, Colin Firth, Stellan Skarsgard and Amanda Seyfried

programme.title: Two Weeks Notice (2002)
programme.desc: An idealistic lawyer catches the attention of a real-estate tycoon, who offers her a job. She starts out thinking she can change his venal ways, but quickly tires of running his life for him. Finding himself in desperate need of her support, the self-absorbed millionaire pulls out all the stops to win her back. Romantic comedy, starring Sandra Bullock, Hugh Grant, Alicia Witt and Dana Ivey

programme.title: Miss Congeniality (2000)
programme.desc: A feminist FBI agent is sent undercover as a contestant in the Miss United States pageant when the event becomes the target of a terrorist bomb threat. As she is not exactly catwalk material, a veteran British coach is brought on board to oversee her transformation into a glamorous beauty queen. Comedy, starring Sandra Bullock, Michael Caine, Benjamin Bratt, Candice Bergen and William Shatner

programme.title: Miss Congeniality 2: Armed and Fabulous (2005)
programme.desc: FBI agent Gracie Hart is taken off active duty and made the face of the bureau's publicity campaign, but would rather catch crooks than be the focus of media attention - so when her friends are kidnapped, she disobeys orders to run her own undercover investigation with the help of a short-tempered colleague. Comedy sequel, starring Sandra Bullock, Regina King, William Shatner and Heather Burns

programme.title: Mean Girls (2004)
programme.desc: A teenager is surprised when she is befriended by the girls in the most popular clique at her new school. However, a dating mishap leads to trouble and her supposed friends start to turn on her. Urged on by other pals outside their circle, the newcomer resolves to bring down the self-appointed queen of campus - only to end up adopting some of her rival's crueller characteristics. Comedy, with Lindsay Lohan, Rachel McAdams, Tina Fey and Lacey Chabert

programme.title: Spanglish (2004)
programme.desc: A Mexican woman is offered a well-paid job as housekeeper to a wealthy American celebrity chef, and relocates with her daughter to Los Angeles - but her employer's neurotic wife causes all sorts of problems. Comedy directed by James L Brooks, starring Paz Vega, Adam Sandler, Tea Leoni and Cloris Leachman

programme.title: The Whole Nine Yards (2000)
programme.desc: Down-on-his-luck suburban dentist Nicholas Oseransky is horrified to discover his new neighbour is a former hitman, who is now in hiding after turning evidence against gangland bosses. When his wife convinces him to contact the Mob to try to extort money in exchange for revealing the crook's location, Nicholas finds himself out of his depth and in mortal danger. Comedy, with Matthew Perry, Bruce Willis, Rosanna Arquette and Michael Clarke Duncan

programme.title: Superbad (2007)
programme.desc: Two teenage friends are on the brink of going to different colleges, so decide to mark the event by going to a party where they hope to lose their virginity. However, they have promised to supply the booze for the event, a task that proves much harder than expected because they are under age. Unfortunately, when a friend steps in to help, the situation gets even worse. Comedy, starring Jonah Hill, Michael Cera and Christopher Mintz-Plasse

programme.title: The Hangover (2009)
programme.desc: Three men on a stag weekend in Las Vegas wake up after a night of heavy drinking and find they have not only misplaced the groom, but somehow gained a tiger and a baby. Unable to remember the details of the night before, they set about piecing the clues together in the hope of finding their missing friend. Comedy, starring Bradley Cooper, Ed Helms and Zach Galifianakis

programme.title: American Pie 2 (2001)
programme.desc: The teenagers reunite after their first year at college to spend the summer at a lake house. Jim is concerned by his lack of sexual experience, and goes in search of an old flame, Oz struggles to keep a long-term relationship going, and Finch tries to master the art of tantric sex. Comedy sequel, starring Jason Biggs, Chris Klein, Seann William Scott, Alyson Hannigan and Eugene Levy

programme.title: American Pie: The Wedding (2003)
programme.desc: The friends from East Great Falls High reunite to celebrate Jim and Michelle's forthcoming wedding. Though reluctant to invite Stifler to their big day, the happy couple relent - but regret their decision when he plans a bachelor party on the same evening Jim is due to meet the in-laws. The third instalment in the comedy series, with Jason Biggs, Alyson Hannigan, Seann William Scott, Eddie Kaye Thomas and Eugene Levy

Unfortunately, when a friend steps in to help, the situation gets even worse. Comedy, starring Jonah Hill, Michael Cera and Christopher Mintz-Plasse

programme.title: Zoolander (2001)
programme.desc: Dim male model Derek Zoolander is stunned to find his career going downhill thanks to the arrival of an equally vacuous rival - but fails to realise he is merely a pawn in a dangerous game of international espionage and world domination. Comedy, starring Ben Stiller, Owen Wilson, Will Ferrell, Milla Jovovich, Christine Taylor and David Duchovny

programme.title: The Shadow's Edge (2025)
programme.desc: A brilliant cyber-criminal gang evades the police's state-of-the-art surveillance system with a haul worth billions. Retired tracking expert Wong Tak-Chong is ushered back into active service to mentor rookie officer He Qiuguo and build an elite unit to stop the criminals. Action thriller, starring Jackie Chan, Zhang Zifeng and Tony Leung Ka-fai

programme.title: Eddington (2025)
programme.desc: A stand-off between a small-town sheriff and mayor sparks a powder keg as neighbours are pitted against each other in Eddington, New Mexico. Modern-day Western, starring Joaquin Phoenix, Emma Stone and Pedro Pascal

programme.title: Regretting You (2025)
programme.desc: A mother and daughter grapple with what's left after a devastating accident reveals a shocking betrayal and forces them to rediscover themselves. Romantic comedy drama, starring Allison Williams, Mckenna Grace and Dave Franco

programme.desc: A young meerkat's grandpa is bitten by a snake, so he sets off to find a magical flower for the cure. Animated adventure, featuring the voices of Cosima Henman, Steve Hudson and Kathleen Renish

programme.title: Spinal Tap II: The End Continues (2025)
programme.desc: Nigel Tufnel, David St Hubbins and Derek Smalls reunite after a 15-year break for one final concert. Their progress is charted once more by documentary maker Marti DiBergi, who offers perhaps too much perspective on their new direction. Comedy sequel, written by and starring Michael McKean, Harry Shearer, Christopher Guest and director Rob Reiner, in his final film. Kerry Godliman and Chris Addison also star with cameos by Paul McCartney, Elton John and Garth Brooks

programme.title: The Running Man (2025)
programme.desc: Desperate to save his sick daughter, Ben Richards enters a deadly televised competition where contestants must survive 30 days while being hunted by professional assassins. Director Edgar Wright's comedy thriller based on the Stephen King story, starring Glen Powell, Lee Pace and Josh Brolin

programme.title: The Conjuring: Last Rites (2025)
programme.desc: Paranormal investigators Ed and Lorraine Warren take on one last terrifying case involving mysterious entities they must confront. Supernatural mystery drama, starring Vera Farmiga, Patrick Wilson and Elliot Cowan

programme.title: Downton Abbey: The Grand Finale (2025)
programme.desc: In the summer of 1930, the Crawleys grapple with the threat of social disgrace when Mary finds herself at the centre of a public scandal. Romantic drama, starring Joely Richardson, Joanne Froggatt and Paul Giamatti

programme.title: Wuthering Heights (2026)
programme.desc: Catherine Earnshaw is raised by her alcoholic father at a Yorkshire farmhouse, with Nelly Dean as a constant companion. Mr Earnshaw 'acquires' an orphaned boy named Heathcliff during one of his gallivants and gifts the waif to Cathy as her pet. The children become inseparable, and as adults they embark on a destructive relationship. Writer-director Emerald Fennell's drama based on Emily Bronte's romance, starring Margot Robbie, Jacob Elordi and Martin Clunes

Director Edgar Wright's comedy thriller based on the Stephen King story, starring Glen Powell, Lee Pace and Josh Brolin

programme.title: We Bury the Dead (2024)
programme.desc: When an experimental military weapon accidentally devastates Tasmania, volunteers travel to the island to help authorities identify the dead. Horror, starring Daisy Ridley, Brenton Thwaites and Mark Coles Smith

programme.desc: A shop owner risks her life to save a colleague from an armed robber wielding an axe. Two teenagers steal a life-size ornamental pig

programme.desc: A jeweller takes the biggest risk of his life when he is confronted by an armed robber. A thief makes a schoolboy error while trying to steal a cash machine from a garage

programme.title: Caught Red Handed
programme.desc: How a pickpocket prowling railway stations preying on women carrying backpacks and bags was hunted down. Plus, the thieves thwarted from taking a parcel from someone's doorstep

programme.desc: Craig and space journalist Sarah Cruddas turn their attention to reports of alien abductions, focusing on the case of Yorkshire policeman Alan Godfrey in November 1980. Alan believed he 'lost' 25 minutes, during which time he was on board the craft being medically examined by small beings and a tall man with a beard

In this episode, experts demonstrate the most important ranged weapons in history, including the Roman spear, the English long bow and the minié ball

programme.title: The Sound and the Fury
programme.desc: Key events of the Second World War, beginning with Germany invading Poland, and touching on Japan's expansion in Asia. Plus, how Africa's colonies became key battlegrounds for power and resources

programme.title: Cracking the Code
programme.desc: The criminal gangs across the world using highly encrypted phones to stay under the radar. The police were once one step behind, until a team of investigators worked out how to turn the phones against the criminals and catch them red-handed

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: The ancient site of Gobekli Tepe challenges what archaeologists believe about the past. The megalithic stone complex was built over 12,000 years ago, 5,000 years before the first-known civilization was said to have emerged in Mesopotamia

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Researchers claim hidden messages can be found within the works of Leonardo da Vinci and other artists that may reveal an extraterrestrial influence

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.sub-title: A Roman Mystery and Waterloo's Disappearing Dead
programme.desc: Alice Roberts meets an archaeology team in Lincoln who are looking for more evidence about a Roman occupation along a road that leaves the city. She also visits Norfolk to explore an Iron Age hillfort, discovering how 4th-century Romans used it despite being built in the Iron Age. At a small community dig in Lincolnshire, Alice learns about a newly found object - a Roman dodecahedron, and discusses its possible functions with a renowned expert in the digging tent

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Alice Roberts visits the south of England, discovering Britain's oldest shoe through a popular form of archaeology - mud larking. While in Kent, Alice visits a dig where one of the largest and oldest stone hand axes in the UK has been uncovered. Another archaeological dig reveals Henry V's lost shipyard on the south coast, and in Dover, Alice learns about top-secret Second World War defences from Jon Barker as he investigates the formerly classified weapons as well as the site where they were found at

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Alice Roberts explores archaeological treasures in the west of Britain, beginning with a look at the remains of Snodhill Castle, a little-known ruin on the crest of a hill in Herefordshire. Alice also joins a team of volunteers and students from Cardiff University unearthing what they believe to be the oldest house ever found in the city

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Alice Roberts spends a year visiting archaeological digs around the country, finding out about discoveries that shed new light on British history. In Buckinghamshire, Simon Mays and Jill Eyers use a recent rediscovery of artefacts from a 1912 excavation to investigate what appears to have been a mass infanticide during the Roman era. Alice also meets the team examining one of the largest discoveries of Roman coins ever made in Britain, and hears about a mystery in Dorset

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Alice Roberts visits Happisburgh in Norfolk, where the discovery of rare artefacts provides evidence of the earliest human occupation in Britain, challenging the conventional belief that mankind would not have been able to survive in northern Europe one million years ago. She also joins a team at Forteviot in Scotland, where the uncovering of a Bronze Age grave holds a big surprise

programme.title: The Proof Is Out There
programme.sub-title: Hairy Serpents, South Pole Nazis and the Horrible Blob
programme.desc: Tony Harris and his team of experts probe reports of a serpent-like creature caught on camera. Plus, whether the discovery of an ancient antenna found beneath the waters of Antarctica offers proof that the Nazis once colonised the South Pole

programme.title: The Sound and the Fury

programme.title: Life After People

programme.desc: The most important battles of the European theatre. programme.desc: The tragic and chilling events that unfolded in 1692 in Salem, Massachusetts, plunging the small town into a frenzy of fear and suspicion. programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Part one of two. Samantha Carter battles to access her memories of Jolinar to save her father, who has been captured by the evil Goa'uld System Lord Sokar. Sci-fi drama, starring Amanda Tapping

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: After a high-stakes homicide case falls apart at trial, Katsumoto asks Magnum to help him stop a killer from walking free, while Higgins helps Jin Jeong with a mystery of his own

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.sub-title: Fagmalion Part One: Gay It Forward
programme.desc: Part one of four. Karen plays Cupid for Will, who soon finds his 'hot and handsome' date is a self-conscious misfit. Meanwhile, Grace worries her extrovert masseuse Julie may have more than a passing interest in her. American sitcom, guest starring Rosanna Arquette and Dan Futterman

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.sub-title: Fagmalion Part Two: Attack of the Clones
programme.desc: Part two of four. Will recalls his own clumsy experience of coming out as he and Jack continue to turn Barry into the perfect gay man. Meanwhile, Grace feels abandoned when Leo offers his much-needed services as a medic in Africa

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer joins the power plant's softball team, confident his home-made bat will lead them to victory. However, Mr Burns upsets his dreams of glory by hiring Major League Baseball players instead

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Career aptitude tests have an unexpected effect on the Simpson kids, prompting Lisa to fall in with a bad crowd while perennial troublemaker Bart finds a new respect for law and order

programme.title: Islands

As scores of people come out of the closet, Marge's sister Patty makes a shock announcement

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Convinced the family no longer loves him, a dejected Santa's Little Helper decides to run away from home, and has the misfortune to be adopted by Mr Burns - who brainwashes him into becoming a vicious attack dog

programme.desc: Andy tries to inspire the team with a trip to Gettysburg, while Robert California challenges staff to think way outside the box

programme.title: The Office (US)
programme.desc: Andy is put in a tricky situation when Robert California sends him mixed messages about hiring his wife

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: On a Clear Day I Can't See My Sister
programme.desc: Bart drives Lisa to distraction on a school trip, tormenting her until she takes out a restraining order forbidding him to come within 20ft of her. Just to be on the safe side, she uses a pole to make sure he keeps his distance. Meanwhile, Grampa is hurt in an incident involving a garden gnome

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Selma realises her hopes of ever bearing a child are diminishing and flies to China to adopt a baby. Asked to fill in her husband's name on the application, she pretends to be married to Homer - but the company co-ordinator (guest star Lucy Liu) sees through the deception. Also featuring the voices of Robert Wagner and David Silverman

programme.title: David Attenborough's Kingdom of Plants
programme.desc: The naturalist explores how the plants at Kew Gardens change through the seasons and demonstrates the surprising properties of several species, including the predatory pond-dwelling bladderwort utricularia and a fungus that appears to be capable of mind control. He also discusses the largest single organism on the planet, visits the world's biggest flower and explains how plants and insects can communicate using scents and music

programme.desc: American talk show in which British comedian, actor and writer John Oliver presents a satirical look at the biggest news stories, political developments and pop culture events of the previous seven days. programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: Yvette Fielding and the team visit Bristol, where they try to solve the mysteries surrounding the SS Great Britain

programme.title: Red Dragon (2002)
programme.desc: The FBI agent who first captured Hannibal Lecter is called out of retirement to catch a demented murderer dubbed the Tooth Fairy, who slaughters a family whenever there is a full moon - forcing the detective to draw on the imprisoned cannibal's expertise in criminal psychology. Thriller prequel adapted from the first of Thomas Harris's Lecter novels, starring Anthony Hopkins, Edward Norton, Ralph Fiennes and Philip Seymour Hoffman

programme.title: Jumanji (1995)
programme.desc: A man who has been trapped inside a mysterious jungle board game for 26 years is eventually freed when two children start to play it. Unfortunately, he arrives with a rampaging horde of animals on his heels, leaving only one solution - to finish the game he started all those years ago. Fantasy adventure, starring Robin Williams, Kirsten Dunst and Bonnie Hunt

programme.title: Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle (2017)
programme.desc: Four teenagers play a jungle-themed game on an old console, only to find themselves transported into the game and transformed into its heroic characters. They must embark on a death-defying journey through the game's wilderness setting to make it back to the real world, or be stuck as video game characters forever. Fantasy action comedy, starring Dwayne Johnson, Karen Gillan, Kevin Hart and Jack Black

programme.title: The First Wives Club (1996)
programme.desc: Three former college friends reunite at the funeral of a mutual acquaintance, who killed herself after her husband left her for a younger woman. Finding themselves in a similar situation, the trio decide to take action and hit their former partners where it hurts most - their finances. Comedy, starring Goldie Hawn, Bette Midler, Diane Keaton, Maggie Smith, Dan Hedaya, Bronson Pinchot and Elizabeth Berkley

programme.title: The Witches of Eastwick (1987)
programme.desc: Three single women dabble in magic to conjure up the perfect lover, and unintentionally summon Satan himself, who seduces them one by one. They come to realise the danger the lecherous devil presents and decide to end their relationships, but the infernal rogue does not take kindly to rejection. Fantasy comedy based on John Updike's novel, with Jack Nicholson, Cher, Michelle Pfeiffer and Susan Sarandon

programme.title: Love Story (1970)
programme.desc: Two students at Harvard University fall in love, but their romance is fated to be cut tragically short by the discovery that one of them has a terminal illness. Romantic drama, starring Ali MacGraw, Ryan O'Neal and Ray Milland

programme.title: Regretting You (2025)
programme.desc: A mother and daughter grapple with what's left after a devastating accident reveals a shocking betrayal and forces them to rediscover themselves. Romantic comedy drama, starring Allison Williams, Mckenna Grace and Dave Franco

programme.title: Wuthering Heights (2026)
programme.desc: Catherine Earnshaw is raised by her alcoholic father at a Yorkshire farmhouse, with Nelly Dean as a constant companion. Mr Earnshaw 'acquires' an orphaned boy named Heathcliff during one of his gallivants and gifts the waif to Cathy as her pet. The children become inseparable, and as adults they embark on a destructive relationship. Writer-director Emerald Fennell's drama based on Emily Bronte's romance, starring Margot Robbie, Jacob Elordi and Martin Clunes

programme.title: On Swift Horses (2025)
programme.desc: Mild-mannered war veteran Lee Walker plans a life of quiet domesticity in California with his wife Muriel and younger brother Julius. Restless after an early discharge from the US Army, Julius steals money from Lee to seek his fortune in Nevada, where he lands a job in security at a casino and sparks forbidden desire with co-worker Henry, which is consummated away from prying eyes. Back in their hotel room, Julius and Henry fantasise about using the same underhand tactics as card sharps to line their pockets. Drama, starring Daisy Edgar-Jones, Jacob Elordi and Will Poulter

programme.title: Bridget Jones: Mad About the Boy (2025)
programme.desc: Recently widowed Bridget enters the dating game once again, caught between her son's science teacher and a man 20 years her junior. Romantic comedy, starring Renee Zellweger, Chiwetel Ejiofor, Hugh Grant, Leo Woodall and Colin Firth

programme.title: Regretting You (2025)
programme.desc: A mother and daughter grapple with what's left after a devastating accident reveals a shocking betrayal and forces them to rediscover themselves. Romantic comedy drama, starring Allison Williams, Mckenna Grace and Dave Franco

programme.title: Wuthering Heights (2026)
programme.desc: Catherine Earnshaw is raised by her alcoholic father at a Yorkshire farmhouse, with Nelly Dean as a constant companion. The children become inseparable, and as adults they embark on a destructive relationship. Writer-director Emerald Fennell's drama based on Emily Bronte's romance, starring Margot Robbie, Jacob Elordi and Martin Clunes

programme.title: Against All Odds (1984)
programme.desc: A nightclub owner with powerful and sinister connections hires a jobless American footballer to track down his runaway girlfriend hiding out in Mexico. The search leads to a remote island, where events take a complicated turn when the wayward girlfriend and the footballer start to fall for each other. Thriller, starring Jeff Bridges, Rachel Ward, James Woods, Richard Widmark and Jane Greer

programme.title: On Swift Horses (2025)
programme.desc: Mild-mannered war veteran Lee Walker plans a life of quiet domesticity in California with his wife Muriel and younger brother Julius. Restless after an early discharge from the US Army, Julius steals money from Lee to seek his fortune in Nevada, where he lands a job in security at a casino and sparks forbidden desire with co-worker Henry, which is consummated away from prying eyes. Back in their hotel room, Julius and Henry fantasise about using the same underhand tactics as card sharps to line their pockets. Drama, starring Daisy Edgar-Jones, Jacob Elordi and Will Poulter

programme.title: Terms of Endearment (1983)
programme.desc: A woman supports her daughter despite their differences over three tumultuous decades. The indomitable matriarch disapproves of her daughter's marriage and finds grandmotherhood hard to get used to, but is fiercely protective of her family when tragedy strikes. Oscar-winning drama, starring Shirley MacLaine, Debra Winger, Jack Nicholson, Danny DeVito and Jeff Daniels

programme.title: Widow Clicquot (2023)
programme.desc: In the late 18th century, a group of women create the Veuve Clicquot champagne business. Drama, starring Haley Bennett, Tom Sturridge and Sam Riley

programme.title: Ferrari (2023)
programme.desc: During the summer of 1957, ex-racecar driver Enzo Ferrari is in crisis. Bankruptcy stalks the company he and his wife, Laura, built from nothing a decade earlier. Their tempestuous marriage struggles with the mourning for one son and the acknowledgement of another. Attempting to secure their survival, he rolls the dice on one race - 1,000 miles across Italy, the iconic Mille Miglia. Director Michael Mann's drama, starring Adam Driver and Jack O'Connell

programme.title: Wuthering Heights (2026)
programme.desc: Catherine Earnshaw is raised by her alcoholic father at a Yorkshire farmhouse, with Nelly Dean as a constant companion. Writer-director Emerald Fennell's drama based on Emily Bronte's romance, starring Margot Robbie, Jacob Elordi and Martin Clunes

programme.title: The Girl on the Train (2016)
programme.desc: Having lost her job and her husband, alcoholic Rachel Watson spends time aimlessly travelling on a train. She gets drawn into a web of intrigue when she becomes fascinated by a woman's disappearance. Rachel thinks she has vital evidence in cracking the case, but gaps in her memory cloud her judgment, and before long her own life is endangered. Thriller based on Paula Hawkins' novel, starring Emily Blunt, Rebecca Ferguson, Haley Bennett, Justin Theroux and Luke Evans

programme.title: Bridget Jones: Mad About the Boy (2025)
programme.desc: Recently widowed Bridget enters the dating game once again, caught between her son's science teacher and a man 20 years her junior. Romantic comedy, starring Renee Zellweger, Chiwetel Ejiofor, Hugh Grant, Leo Woodall and Colin Firth

programme.title: The Legend of Tarzan (2016)
programme.desc: Economic unrest ensues after King Leopold cuts off access to the Belgian Congo, so years after leaving his old home behind, Tarzan is lured back from Victorian England hoping to stabilise matters. However, he soon finds he has been lured into a deadly trap orchestrated by one of Leopold's envoys. Adventure, starring Alexander Skarsgard, Margot Robbie and Samuel L Jackson

programme.title: Wuthering Heights (2026)
programme.desc: Catherine Earnshaw is raised by her alcoholic father at a Yorkshire farmhouse, with Nelly Dean as a constant companion. Mr Earnshaw 'acquires' an orphaned boy named Heathcliff during one of his gallivants and gifts the waif to Cathy as her pet. The children become inseparable, and as adults they embark on a destructive relationship. Writer-director Emerald Fennell's drama based on Emily Bronte's romance, starring Margot Robbie, Jacob Elordi and Martin Clunes

programme.title: The Girl on the Train (2016)
programme.desc: Having lost her job and her husband, alcoholic Rachel Watson spends time aimlessly travelling on a train. She gets drawn into a web of intrigue when she becomes fascinated by a woman's disappearance. Rachel thinks she has vital evidence in cracking the case, but gaps in her memory cloud her judgment, and before long her own life is endangered. Thriller based on Paula Hawkins' novel, starring Emily Blunt, Rebecca Ferguson, Haley Bennett, Justin Theroux and Luke Evans

programme.title: Bullet Train (2022)
programme.desc: Unlucky US assassin Ladybug is given a simple mission - retrieve a metal briefcase on a high-speed train departing from Tokyo. The pick-up is too easy, but Ladybug discovers that four other killers are on board the same train, and that their missions have something in common. John Wick director David Leitch's comedy thriller, starring Brad Pitt, Joey King, Aaron Taylor-Johnson and Sandra Bullock

programme.title: SAS: Red Notice (2021)
programme.desc: Off-duty SAS soldier Tom Buckingham attempts to thwart a terror attack on a train running through the Channel Tunnel. Despite being injured, Buckingham is the only chance of survival for the passengers. Action thriller based on the novel by Andy McNab, starring Sam Heughan, Ruby Rose, Andy Serkis, Hannah John-Kamen and Tom Hopper

programme.title: The Rookie
programme.desc: The rookies are asked to develop their first confidential informants. Meanwhile, Officer Chen's mother complicates her home life when she comes to stay with her

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: After a reporter and his fiancee are gunned down outside a restaurant, Goren and Eames are given a seemingly reliable eyewitness description of the killer. However, while on the trail of their suspect, they discover the journalist was planning to publish an expose on corruption within the sanitation industry, taking their investigation in an entirely new direction

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: After the team finds a connection between a spate of bombings and a private veterans' club, Isobel tells OA to recruit his former Army buddy for intel

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: When an assault at gunpoint is witnessed through a neighbouring window, the squad scrambles to locate the victim to confirm she's safe, but a threat to extort her family leads to a shocking suspect

programme.title: Send in the Dogs
programme.desc: Billy the new sniffer spaniel finds live ammunition during a search for drugs, and a stabbing on the streets of London brings together two of the city's leading Alsatian dog teams. PC Mandy Chapman and her canine companion Karly are sent in to enforce a court warrant against a dangerous dog, while Sergeant Peter Madden and Brodie are on the trail of burglars using stolen cars as getaway vehicles. Narrated by Ken Stott

programme.title: Nothing to Declare
programme.desc: A woman tries to smuggle a very expensive gift back into Australia, while an escort and his boyfriend are held in separate immigration interview rooms. programme.title: Nothing to Declare

programme.title: Nothing to Declare
programme.desc: Officers suspect there are drugs hidden in a man's bag, and a travelling musician, who claims to possess special powers enabling her to foretell the future, struggles to get through immigration. Meanwhile. Biosecurity officials discover an unusual concoction in the bag of a traveller

programme.title: Nothing to Declare
programme.desc: A man is caught red-handed by customs and tries to blame his travelling companion, but officials suspect they could be working together. In 2024, during the June Bank holiday weekend, Cumann Peile Cill na Martra in Gaeltacht Mhúscraí hosted the event. The team soon realises the group are not as close-knit as they initially seem, and with everyone hiding a secret, the pressure is on to get to the bottom of how and why Dan was killed. The case gives the British detective a sudden desire to become a sailor, while Florence surprises the team with her action hero credentials. Caribbean crime drama, starring Kris Marshall and Joséphine Jobert

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: DI Goodman is called in to investigate the death of former surgeon Emma Redding at a retirement home. With an empty packet of sleeping pills beside her body and her room locked from the inside, it looks like an open-and-shut case of suicide. However, the team discovers everything is not as it seems and mounting evidence suggests she may in fact have been poisoned. Then, a blast from Humphrey's past arrives unexpectedly on the island, and looks set to distract him from solving the case. Guest starring Rupert Vansittart, Joanna David, Phil Davis and Michele Dotrice

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: The island is rocked when Saint Marie's governor Caroline Bamber drops dead at her leaving party, with the commissioner standing right next to her. As DI Goodman and the team try to deduce how she could have been poisoned without their boss noticing any foul play, they find themselves entering the murky world of island politics, where blackmail, threats and corruption seem commonplace - fuelled by ongoing tension between the French and British. Meanwhile, Humphrey braves the world of online dating, under the guidance of ladies' man Dwayne - and soon finds his perfect match. Lucy Cohu and Nigel Lindsay guest star

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A fashion show takes a chilling turn when young model Zoe Mackay is strangled just moments after leaving the catwalk, and while the crew and other models come under suspicion, they all have watertight alibis. To make matters worse, there are no witnesses or DNA evidence, the only clue being a single stocking clasped in the victim's hand. What does it mean - and how was her killer able to strike without being spotted? Meanwhile, Florence tries to help Humphrey improve his social skills with the opposite sex, and JP recognises one of the models as a school crush on at school. But will she remember him?

programme.desc: Dara O Briain and Hugh Dennis front a special edition of the topical comedy show featuring best bits and unseen material from the series

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Comedian Sara Pascoe, retail consultant Mary Portas, comedian Paul Sinha and broadcaster Rylan join host Rob Brydon and regular captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack on the comedy panel show. As usual, the participants aim to hoodwink their opponents with absurd facts and plausible lies about themselves in a bid to secure a team victory

programme.desc: Host Sandi Toksvig is in search of victory with panellists Rob Beckett, Daliso Chaponda, Lara Ricote and Alan Davies

programme.title: Live at the Apollo
programme.desc: Comedians Celya AB and Neil Delamere perform stand-up at the Hammersmith Apollo, hosted by Lou Sanders

programme.desc: Maisie Adam hosts the comedy show filmed at London's Hammersmith Apollo, warming up the audience before introducing stand-up routines by fellow comedians Michael Odewale and Susie McCabe

programme.title: Border Force: America's Gatekeepers
programme.desc: Packages of cocaine are found concealed in the chassis of a bus, officers receive a tip-off about a vehicle loaded with cartel cash, and a magician comes under scrutiny

programme.title: Border Force: America's Gatekeepers
programme.desc: A shipment of cocaine is discovered in the fifth wheel of a tractor-trailer, and officers searching a courier van find a cache of firearms

programme.title: Extreme Salvage Squad
programme.desc: A marine machine boils over as Christopher bleeds out, Luke cuts loose as ten tonnes of trouble leaves the team high and dry, and Shaun and Sarah handle a red-hot recovery

programme.title: Rick Stein's India
programme.desc: The chef visits the town of Madurai in Tamil Nadu, where he learns the art of temple cooking and samples south Indian dish sambar. He then takes a road trip across the Western Ghats to the state of Kerala, where he prepares regional dessert payasam and a traditional pork curry

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Rob Brydon presents, as regular team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack are joined by one-time Bake Off champion Nadiya Hussain, comic and actor Michael Smiley, and comedians Bob Mortimer and Diane Morgan. As usual, the participants aim to hoodwink their opponents with absurd facts and plausible lies about themselves in a bid to secure a team victory and the dubious honour of being dubbed the liar of the week

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Comedy panel show, hosted by Rob Brydon, in which team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack are joined by celebrity guests Nikki Fox, Miles Jupp, Nish Kumar and Joe Lycett to hoodwink their opponents with absurd facts and plausible lies about themselves

programme.title: Richard Osman's House of Games
programme.desc: Lucy Beaumont, Shazia Mirza, Joe Thomas and Jake Wood go toe-to-toe testing their general knowledge skills in a variety of trivia-based games across the week

programme.title: The Americas with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon reaches the United States, travelling down the Rocky Mountains from Montana to Colorado. In the wide-open prairies of Montana, the cowboy way of life is under threat from a long-term decline in the rural economy, but Simon meets a former Silicon Valley executive who has envisaged a new future for the land. In a country with the highest incarceration rate in the world, Simon's final destination on this leg is a Colorado town that depends almost entirely on 11 prisons. Simon witnesses how inmates are put to work for the state, and how virtual reality is being used to prepare prisoners for life on the outside

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: The team cast their eyes over the best-looking cars in the world, with Jeremy Clarkson testing the Aston Martin DB7, Jason Dawe checking out a second-hand Mercedes E320 cabriolet and Peugeot 406 coupe, and Richard Hammond examining the Citroen DS. Plus, two industry insiders give an insight into the future of car design. Actor Ross Kemp is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Comedian Steve Coogan joins the team as Jeremy Clarkson drives the Ferrari 575 M and the Aston Martin Vanquish, both of which feature F1-style paddle-shift gearboxes, and the Lotus Esprit takes the Top Gear power test. Plus, how to create a gadget-packed James Bond car on a tight budget

programme.title: Hairy Bikers' Best of British
programme.desc: Si King and Dave Myers celebrate British pork, preparing a traditional gala pie and a rolled loin with apricots and ginger. They also explore the role the pig has played in the UK's history and travel to a farm in Gloucestershire to visit a couple raising rare breeds

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Rob Brydon presents, as regular team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack are joined by one-time Bake Off champion Nadiya Hussain, comic and actor Michael Smiley, and comedians Bob Mortimer and Diane Morgan. As usual, the participants aim to hoodwink their opponents with absurd facts and plausible lies about themselves in a bid to secure a team victory and the dubious honour of being dubbed the liar of the week

programme.desc: Comedy panel show, hosted by Rob Brydon, in which team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack are joined by celebrity guests Nikki Fox, Miles Jupp, Nish Kumar and Joe Lycett to hoodwink their opponents with absurd facts and plausible lies about themselves

programme.title: Richard Osman's House of Games
programme.desc: Ashley John-Baptiste, Simon Rimmer, Claire Sweeney and Esme Young test their general knowledge skills in a variety of trivia-based games across the week

programme.title: The Way Out
programme.desc: Host Mel Giedroyc drops two teams of comedians, led by Ed Gamble and Nish Kumar, into four bespoke, themed escape rooms with one simple instruction: the winner is the first team to find 'the way out'. Two pairs of comedians flounder through an escape room, braving the elements, cracking slippery clues and working to get a fish shop open, as their teammates cheer them on

programme.title: Have I Got a Bit More News for You
programme.desc: Victoria Coren Mitchell hosts an extended episode of the satirical quiz, with panellists Chris McCausland and Janet Street-Porter joining team captains Paul Merton and Ian Hislop

programme.title: QI XL
programme.desc: Host Sandi Toksvig is in search of victory with panellists Rob Beckett, Daliso Chaponda, Lara Ricote and Alan Davies

programme.desc: The comedian returns with his New World Order end of year special where, with the help of his guests, he'll dissect the bewildering year that was 2021. Frankie reviews and discusses all the big stories from the last 12 months along with a selection of unbelievable clips

programme.title: Rick Stein's India
programme.desc: The chef goes in search of the best chicken korma in Lucknow, learns the complexities of making rice dish pulao and joins partygoers at one of India's major Hindu festivals. In Punjab, he observes the age-old process involved in the production of the unrefined sugar known as jaggery and is recruited as a guest judge to find the state's new Star Chef. programme.title: Would I Lie to You?

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Comedy panel show, hosted by Rob Brydon, in which team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack are joined by celebrity guests Nikki Fox, Miles Jupp, Nish Kumar and Joe Lycett to hoodwink their opponents with absurd facts and plausible lies about themselves

programme.title: Richard Osman's House of Games
programme.desc: Lucy Beaumont, Shazia Mirza, Joe Thomas and Jake Wood go toe-to-toe testing their general knowledge skills in a variety of trivia-based games across the week

programme.title: The Americas with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon reaches the United States, travelling down the Rocky Mountains from Montana to Colorado. In the wide-open prairies of Montana, the cowboy way of life is under threat from a long-term decline in the rural economy, but Simon meets a former Silicon Valley executive who has envisaged a new future for the land. In a country with the highest incarceration rate in the world, Simon's final destination on this leg is a Colorado town that depends almost entirely on 11 prisons. Simon witnesses how inmates are put to work for the state, and how virtual reality is being used to prepare prisoners for life on the outside

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: The team cast their eyes over the best-looking cars in the world, with Jeremy Clarkson testing the Aston Martin DB7, Jason Dawe checking out a second-hand Mercedes E320 cabriolet and Peugeot 406 coupe, and Richard Hammond examining the Citroen DS. Plus, two industry insiders give an insight into the future of car design. Actor Ross Kemp is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Comedian Steve Coogan joins the team as Jeremy Clarkson drives the Ferrari 575 M and the Aston Martin Vanquish, both of which feature F1-style paddle-shift gearboxes, and the Lotus Esprit takes the Top Gear power test. Plus, how to create a gadget-packed James Bond car on a tight budget

programme.title: Hairy Bikers' Best of British
programme.desc: Si King and Dave Myers celebrate British pork, preparing a traditional gala pie and a rolled loin with apricots and ginger. They also explore the role the pig has played in the UK's history and travel to a farm in Gloucestershire to visit a couple raising rare breeds

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Stamp has an action-packed first day with the Flying Squad

programme.title: Doctors
programme.desc: Jimmi helps a man suffering from clinical depression whose wife died three months previously. Ruth is jealous of Michelle and Mike's relationship, and later helps an 18-year-old make a complaint against Mike after he gives her a bag of condoms. Nick goes to see Caroline's son, Ed, in the hope that he will talk to his mother

programme.title: Doctors
programme.desc: Ronnie and George face a dilemma when a girl caught stealing in the surgery reveals she is only doing it to protect her heroin-addicted mother. Melody receives positive feedback about how she is progressing as a doctor and Nick is surprised when Caroline turns up to cheer him on in the charity wheelchair race. Sean Gleeson and Stirling Gallacher star

programme.title: Holby City
programme.desc: As the day of the wedding dawns, Chrissie and Owen wake up together. But while she is convinced this means he won't go through with marrying Diane, she is soon disabused of this notion when he dismisses the previous night as a drunken mistake. Tricia ends up becoming everybody's confidante, and Jodie is rushed to hospital after she collapses at Mickie's house. Connie discovers her condition is caused by a disastrous old operation, and ends up having to remove her lung. The tense situation is complicated further when it emerges Jodie and Will have a history together

programme.title: Casualty
programme.desc: Several patients are brought into the ED with similar symptoms, and as their conditions worsen, Dylan races to find a link between them. Meanwhile, new nurses Lloyd and Scarlett struggle with the emotional demands of their jobs and Linda forms a bond with two drug addicts. Guest starring Naomi Bentley (Ideal), Tina O'Brien (Coronation Street's Sarah Platt) and Gaynor Faye (Fat Friends)

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Stamp has an action-packed first day with the Flying Squad

programme.title: Classic EastEnders
programme.desc: Phil's worst nightmare becomes a reality, Patrick is forced to come face-to-face with his failings, and Max has to choose between his daughter and his lover

programme.title: Classic EastEnders
programme.desc: Phil responds to his situation in the worst way possible, Chelsea has a tough confession to make, and Carol meets her match. Meanwhile, a nasty surprise arrives from Max's past

programme.title: Harry Wild
programme.desc: Chief Superintendent Ray Tiernan, Charlie's mentor and Harry's ex-lover, is murdered, and his estranged wife, Vivian Mitchell-Tiernan, is found slumped over his dead body with the murder weapon in her hand. Harry and Fergus vow to identify the killer. Harry breaks into the Garda station to look for clues and finds a link to a dirty cop

programme.title: The Doctor Blake Mysteries
programme.desc: When a life model is found murdered at the start of a painting class Dr Blake is drawn into a difficult and troubling investigation, and he is consequently forced to confront his own family's past - and his mother's history as an artist

programme.title: Lovejoy
programme.desc: Charlie Gimbert plans an elaborate double-cross to get his hands on a pair of valuable Meissen figurines, sold to Lovejoy by a woman who needed some quick cash to buy drugs. Drama, starring Ian McShane

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Sharon's husband Chris sees a family tragedy as the perfect opportunity to escape from prison. Comedy, starring Pauline Quirke and Linda Robson

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: When Auntie Wainwright forces a gigantic tractor wheel on the trio, Foggy decides to craft a vehicle out of it. However, in doing so he manages to prove that the invention of the wheel might not have been such a good idea after all. Bill Owen, Peter Sallis and Brian Wilde star

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: Compo decides he wants to be up to the physical standard of Rudolph Valentino so Foggy devises an assault course, but Clegg stays out of it

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: Auntie Wainwright gives the boys a gas grill, but they have difficulty working out how the pressure valve works, bringing an explosive touch to their barbecue. Howard is busy making improvements on his love-nest, but whether it will ignite Marina's passions or just inflame her remains to be seen. Peter Sallis, Bill Owen, Brian Wilde and Robert Fyfe star

programme.title: The Brokenwood Mysteries
programme.desc: Disaster strikes when Mike's favourite country musician Holly Collins is found electrocuted in what appears to be a drunken accident or possibly suicide. However, Mike finds a note scrawled in lipstick and begins to investigate the dysfunctional band members - Slim Fingers, Waylon Strings and Jesse James. Detective drama, starring Neill Rea

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: Sandra is reunited with an old flame when DCI Larson of the Met's arts and antiques squad asks her to look into the murder of an antiques dealer who was not quite as legitimate as everyone thought. Brian is puzzled by Esther's odd behaviour and her new-found interest in the internet, leading him to think the unthinkable - she must be having an affair. Paul McGann and Jesse Birdsall guest star, with Amanda Redman and Alun Armstrong

programme.title: Dalziel & Pascoe
programme.desc: The death of a retired detective on his favourite golf course looks like a copycat murder. Dalziel points the finger of suspicion at local villain Danny Macer - but his relentless pursuit of his old adversary only serves to get him thrown off the case. Feature-length episode, directed by and starring Warren Clarke, with guest appearances from John Duttine, Pippa Guard and Diana Quick

programme.title: Lovejoy
programme.desc: Charlie Gimbert plans an elaborate double-cross to get his hands on a pair of valuable Meissen figurines, sold to Lovejoy by a woman who needed some quick cash to buy drugs. Drama, starring Ian McShane

programme.title: The Brokenwood Mysteries
programme.desc: When the Brokenwood Small Business Association stage a Mexican 'Day of the Dead' night market, they don't bargain on an actual dead body becoming part of the festivities

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Carver is angry when he is forced to take care of a suspected cop killer's family

programme.title: Doctors
programme.desc: Two ageing patients flirt while waiting in the surgery, and Ruth gently persuades them they might be right for each other. Michelle is not impressed with Mike when he turns up late for dinner, having gone to the pub with Archie after work. Meanwhile, Nick and Caroline decide to spend the day together. Guest starring Jean Boht

programme.title: Doctors
programme.desc: Michelle confronts two shoplifters, but her act of heroism receives little thanks. Ronnie finds Eva working undercover and promises not to reveal her identity, even to Jimmi, and Nick plans the perfect moment to reveal a surprise for Caroline. Former Bad Girls actor James Gaddas guest stars

programme.title: Holby City
programme.sub-title: Be Careful What You Wish For
programme.desc: Jess goes in for a routine scan, which exposes how many weeks pregnant she is. When she begins bleeding, Mubbs is forced to reveal this information in surgery - which in turn proves that Sean cannot be the father. Mark considers resuming his relationship with Tricia, although Chrissie isn't sure it's a wise move. Mickie pressures Jodie for the truth, and the resulting revelation prompts Will to consider resigning, until an incident involving a patient convinces him otherwise - but Jodie is still plotting revenge

programme.title: Casualty
programme.desc: Emma Samms (Dynasty's Fallon Carrington Colby) stars in the show's 25th anniversary episode, as a woman mistakenly convinced she is being pursued by a stranger. Meanwhile, new nurse Lloyd's life is placed in jeopardy when he refuses to break his moral code and lie to a patient, and Zoe is surprised to learn Dylan helps paramedics at the scene of accidents on a voluntary basis. With Sunetra Sarker and Michael Obiora

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Carver is angry when he is forced to take care of a suspected cop killer's family

programme.title: Classic EastEnders
programme.desc: Peggy makes a decision that will haunt her forever, Rainie wreaks her own special brand of havoc, and Walford says goodbye to a much-loved pair

programme.title: Classic EastEnders
programme.desc: Phil's despair leads him down a dark path, and the Trueman-Foxes must attend yet another funeral. Meanwhile, Carol's old vices rear their heads, and Max puts his foot down

programme.title: Harry Wild
programme.desc: Harry and Fergus are hired by a woman whose sister has gone missing in a sinister village in the countryside, and soon find a skeleton dumped in the woods. They unearth a glut of possible suspects, including a doctor's bitter wife, a creepy old gravedigger and an angry priest with a dark secret to hide

programme.title: The Doctor Blake Mysteries
programme.desc: Blake is called to investigate after a priest is found to have died in his confession booth from suspected bee stings, and discovers the church's other minister keeps his hives at the site - but would he resort to murder to get a promotion? Australian detective drama set in 1959, starring Craig McLachlan as maverick country town doctor Lucien Blake

programme.title: Lovejoy
programme.desc: A robbery at the local museum sets Lovejoy off on the trail of a hoard of Roman coins hidden on the Isle of Man - but he soon discovers two Americans are also searching for it. Drama, starring Ian McShane

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Trouble lies in store for Sharon when she finds romance, and Tracey starts a business venture with Dorien. Comedy, starring Pauline Quirke, Linda Robson and Lesley Joseph

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: Compo and Foggy drink too much home brew at Ernie Mordue's funeral, resulting in bad hangovers for both of them. Bill Owen and Brian Wilde star

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.sub-title: Have You Got a Light Mate?
programme.desc: Howard asks Clegg to buy a china shepherdess from Auntie Wainwright's on his behalf, but she seems more interested in selling security lights. An unfortunate incident means that Foggy has to be rescued from the police. Peter Sallis and Brian Wilde star

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: Foggy, Clegg and Compo get into another scrape after Howard asks them to deliver an unusual gift to Marina - a cast iron bath

programme.title: 'Allo 'Allo!
programme.desc: The communists capture Von Strohm and Geering, but they are soon rescued by a Gaullist group, recovering a valuable painting in the process. Comedy, starring Richard Marner and Sam Kelly

programme.title: 'Allo 'Allo!
programme.sub-title: The Dance of the Hitler Youth
programme.desc: The Germans celebrate the burning of the Reichstag with a little Bavarian dancing, while Rene breaks into Herr Flick's lair and the British airmen attempt to cross the channel by rowing boat

programme.title: 'Allo 'Allo!
programme.desc: Presuming Rene is dead, Edith hunts for his will and a new husband. Meanwhile, the airmen pose as nuns and Herr Flick enlists Lt Gruber's artistic expertise in distinguishing a real painting from two forgeries. Second World War comedy, starring Gorden Kaye

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: The team investigates the mystery of a missing scientist, after the man's wife receives a series of emails from someone claiming to know what happened to him. The physics professor was last seen in 2004, on a train to Paris for a conference, and when he disappeared he was working on a potentially lucrative cold fusion project that had attracted attention from many large organisations. However, as the detectives dig deeper, a shadowy Whitehall figure warns Sandra's boss Strickland they should drop the case

programme.title: Dalziel & Pascoe
programme.desc: Feature-length episode. Convicted murderer Charlie Walker seizes his chance to escape while in transit across the moors. The next morning a barmaid is discovered dead - leaving the duo to figure out whether she was killed by the fugitive. Tim Healy and Lynda Bellingham guest star

programme.title: Lovejoy
programme.desc: A robbery at the local museum sets Lovejoy off on the trail of a hoard of Roman coins hidden on the Isle of Man - but he soon discovers two Americans are also searching for it. Drama, starring Ian McShane

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Trouble lies in store for Sharon when she finds romance, and Tracey starts a business venture with Dorien. Comedy, starring Pauline Quirke, Linda Robson and Lesley Joseph

programme.title: Monsieur Spade
programme.desc: The tragedy of the horrific murders are felt by all in the town. Pulled out of retirement, Spade begins to investigate, while Teresa keeps her cards close to her chest

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: The Two Ronnies
programme.desc: Vintage comedy from Messrs Barker and Corbett, including music by Barbara Dickson, and another instalment of the Worm That Turned

programme.title: A Very British Murder with Lucy Worsley
programme.desc: An examination of the dark history behind Britain's fascination with murder, beginning with historian and curator Lucy Worsley exploring how notorious killings were transformed into popular entertainment in the first half of the 19th century

programme.title: A Very British Murder with Lucy Worsley
programme.desc: In the second programme, the historian explores how science and detection influenced the popular culture of murder during Victorian times. Writers including Charles Dickens and Wilkie Collins were fascinated by grisly crimes, and the literary genre that came out of it captured the imagination of readers. The presenter also reveals that when Jack the Ripper began his reign of terror in London at the same time Robert Louis Stevenson's Dr Jekyll and Mr Hyde was published, the idea of the serial killer was introduced to the British public

programme.title: A Very British Murder with Lucy Worsley
programme.desc: The historian tells the story of one of the first high-profile killers - Dr Crippen, who was hanged in 1910 for poisoning and dismembering his wife - before turning her attention to the interwar period, when detective fiction reached the peak of its popularity at the hands of authors Agatha Christie and Dorothy L Sayers. After undergoing the elaborate initiation ceremony of the Detection Club, which was set up by a group of British writers in 1930, Lucy considers how Alfred Hitchcock's films and Graham Greene's books eclipsed the traditional murder-mystery story in the depiction of homicide

programme.title: Great Canal Journeys
programme.desc: Timothy West and Prunella Scales explore Argentina's waterways in a traditional cargo boat, venturing into a labyrinth of canals and rivers in the jungles outside Buenos Aires. They visit the jungle town of Tigre and a remote enclave of Anglo Argentines, who still toast the Queen, as well as learning more about the war that swept the country in the 1970s and performing a traditional dance

programme.title: Great Canal Journeys
programme.desc: Timothy West and Prunella Scales navigate the Lancaster Canal, an early masterpiece that wends its way north through the city of Lancaster and along the coast at Morecambe Bay. The waterway is largely rural, running through rolling open countryside and deep woods and also boasts one of the most elegant pieces of canal architecture in the country in the Lune Aqueduct. When their journey reaches Carnforth, Tim and Pru visit its train station, which was used as the key location in David Lean's classic film Brief Encounter. Long-forgotten memories rise to the surface for Pru as she visits the lakeland village of Near Sawrey, where her family lived during much of the Second World War and as a child she once saw Beatrix Potter

programme.title: Great Canal Journeys
programme.desc: Timothy West and Prunella Scales explore Canada's Rideau Canal, which travels 125 miles through the backwoods of Ontario, connecting Lake Ontario with the city of Ottawa. Along the way, they visit Fort Henry and navigate the famous Ottawa lock, and meet the descendants of the Algonquin guides who helped with the original construction

programme.title: River Walks
programme.desc: Blind adventurer Amar Latif travels along one of the region's most stunning river valleys, abseiling into a hidden gorge, canoeing across a reservoir, and meeting the local llamas while following a riverside trail along the Nidd

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Train Truckers
programme.desc: A legendary diesel locomotive, that's undergone over half a million pounds worth of repairs must be hauled over 40 miles ready for a diesel gala

programme.title: Train Truckers
programme.desc: The Train Truckers are on the clock this week as they attempt to move a 100-ton diesel engine to a gala extravaganza, as well as a 175-ton rail crane destined for Egypt

programme.title: Aussie Road Train Truckers
programme.desc: Documentary series following a cast of Australian road train drivers as they haul cargo across the Outback - the drivers are often away from their families for weeks at a time chasing contracts along some of the world?s longest roads. The drivers all have highly specialised road skills and knowledge of the local environment - with their trailers in tow, they battle unforgiving terrain and weather conditions to deliver food, cattle and construction supplies to those who need it the most.

programme.title: Aussie Road Train Truckers
programme.desc: Jack and Hollywood work to deliver $500,000-worth of cattle, Dave is booked to collect a $75,000 ute, and trucker Jorden has broken down and desperately needs help

programme.title: Fred Dibnah's Magnificent Monuments

programme.desc: A US Army Air Force C47 that dropped paratroopers on D-Day is at the centre of one of the UK's most ambitious warbird rebuilds

programme.title: Warbird Workshop
programme.desc: A team of engineers fight to return a veteran Westland Wessex helicopter to the skies - 30 years after its last flight

programme.title: Warbird Workshop
programme.desc: Aircraft restoration expert Mark Masters and his son James rebuild a 1943 US Army Aeronca Defender liaison plane for its German owner

programme.title: Open All Hours
programme.sub-title: Fig Biscuits and Inspirational Toilet Rolls

programme.title: Not Going Out

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: The Trotters embark on a venture involving the decoration of Denzil's flat. When they find his wife's beloved canary lying dead in its cage, they assume responsibility and race to replace it before the deal is ruined. Comedy, with David Jason, Nicholas Lyndhurst and Lennard Pearce

programme.title: Still Open All Hours
programme.desc: Mrs Featherstone, aka the Black Widow, decides the time has come to learn to drive - if only she can find an instructor prepared to give her more than one lesson. Kath organises a bring and buy sale for charity, but Eric is less than happy when he discovers she is planning to put his favourite clothes on her stall. Meanwhile, romance seems to be blossoming for Madge and Gastric, and Willis finally gets away from his mother to go on a date with Ruby. David Jason, Stephanie Cole, Tim Healy and Johnny Vegas star

programme.title: The Green Green Grass

programme.title: The Power of Parker
programme.desc: The morning after the night before has not started well. Diane is worried that she did not impress the school governors, Kath is revealing more than she should to the women in the old people's home and Martin is desperately trying to get his hands on a chunk of cash

programme.title: Don't Wait Up
programme.desc: Tom speculates that Toby must be seeing a woman when he stays out all night - but in fact he was helping a colleague who had suffered a heart attack

programme.title: The Power of Parker
programme.desc: Moneylenders move in on Martin's family, leaving him with no choice but to fight back. Meanwhile, Diane and Kath decide to pursue Martin in the hope that they can work out what he's up to. They follow him to his accountant's house, but when Alan refuses to get involved Martin takes matters into his own hands and decides to confront the Slater Brothers in a backstreet nightclub. Comedy co-written by and starring Sian Gibson, with George Costigan, Conleth Hill, Rosie Cavaliero, Sheila Reid and Jason Barnett

programme.title: The Power of Parker
programme.desc: Martin gets into even deeper water with the Slater brothers, while accountant Alan has surprising information for Kath and Diane, providing them with the perfect opportunity to get revenge on the philandering businessman. The first step is for Kath to steal an important document from the office - but when Martin turns up, things don't go exactly as planned

programme.title: Men Behaving Badly
programme.desc: Gary is pleased to be stuck in a lift with Deborah, while Tony tries his hand at the art of seduction - with a van and a blanket. Laddish comedy, starring Martin Clunes, Neil Morrissey, Leslie Ash and Caroline Quentin

programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Porridge
programme.desc: Harris accidentally drops stolen pills into Fletcher's midday cuppa - much to the annoyance of prison racketeer Harry Grout, who resents a newcomer muscling in on his patch. Classic comedy, starring Ronnie Barker. First broadcast in 1977

programme.title: The Green Green Grass
programme.desc: Boycie's competitive spirit is fired up when a broke Llewellyn challenges him to a pub quiz with a £5,000 jackpot - but sadly, Bryan, Jed and Marlene's general knowledge leaves a lot to be desired. Tyler tries to make amends after Beth accuses him of being anti-Welsh. Comedy, starring John Challis

programme.title: Are You Being Served?
programme.desc: Mrs Slocombe takes charge of the department while Mr Rumbold is off sick, leading to friction with the staff. Shop-floor comedy, with John Inman, Mollie Sugden and Frank Thornton

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.sub-title: Here We Go into the Wild Blue Yonder
programme.desc: Part one of two. Compo yearns to reach for the skies in a hang-glider to impress Nora Batty, but finds a challenge to climb a tree more than enough to handle. Meanwhile, the object of his affections pesters Wally to take her out for a meal. Long-running comedy set in rural Yorkshire, starring Bill Owen and Kathy Staff

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.sub-title: Here We Go Again into the Wild Blue Yonder
programme.desc: Part two of two. Wally finishes the hang-glider and declares that it is ready to be tested, so Compo steps into the fray. Long-running comedy set in rural Yorkshire, starring Bill Owen and Kathy Staff

Comedy, starring Lee Mack, Tim Vine, Sally Bretton and Katy Wix

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lucy has her god-daughter dumped on her overnight, which wouldn't be so bad except the girl's stay coincides with her birthday - leaving the inexperienced guardian and her flatmate Lee struggling to come up with appropriate entertainment for a bunch of excited nine-year-olds. programme.title: Not Going Out

programme.desc: In a desperate bid to prove his manliness, the happy-go-lucky Lee embarks on a camping trip with the object of his affections Lucy, his best mate Tim and his partner Daisy, but the spooky forest where they have chosen to pitch their tents could prove a little too intimidating for him to handle. Comedy, starring Lee Mack, Tim Vine, Sally Bretton and Katy Wix

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lucy has her god-daughter dumped on her overnight, which wouldn't be so bad except the girl's stay coincides with her birthday - leaving the inexperienced guardian and her flatmate Lee struggling to come up with appropriate entertainment for a bunch of excited nine-year-olds. Lee Mack and Sally Bretton star, with a guest appearance by Paul Kaye (Game of Thrones)

programme.title: The Power of Parker
programme.desc: The morning after the night before has not started well. Diane is worried that she did not impress the school governors, Kath is revealing more than she should to the women in the old people's home and Martin is desperately trying to get his hands on a chunk of cash

programme.title: Don't Wait Up
programme.desc: Tom speculates that Toby must be seeing a woman when he stays out all night - but in fact he was helping a colleague who had suffered a heart attack

programme.title: The Power of Parker
programme.desc: Moneylenders move in on Martin's family, leaving him with no choice but to fight back. Meanwhile, Diane and Kath decide to pursue Martin in the hope that they can work out what he's up to. They follow him to his accountant's house, but when Alan refuses to get involved Martin takes matters into his own hands and decides to confront the Slater Brothers in a backstreet nightclub. Comedy co-written by and starring Sian Gibson, with George Costigan, Conleth Hill, Rosie Cavaliero, Sheila Reid and Jason Barnett

programme.title: The Power of Parker
programme.desc: Martin gets into even deeper water with the Slater brothers, while accountant Alan has surprising information for Kath and Diane, providing them with the perfect opportunity to get revenge on the philandering businessman. The first step is for Kath to steal an important document from the office - but when Martin turns up, things don't go exactly as planned

programme.title: Men Behaving Badly

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the team return to Veterans Street in Manchester, where, in 2015, with the help of Prince William and Prince Harry, DIY SOS launched their most ambitious project yet - transforming a derelict street into a vibrant community for veterans and local people. This time they build the final home for decorated former soldier and single dad Simon Flores, whose foot was blown off by a roadside bomb during a patrol in Iraq

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: The team helps a couple whose 24-year-old son Ryan has been living in hospital for the last five years, as they renovate the downstairs of their three-bedroom house in Bristol so he can move back home. The house needs a downstairs extension with all the bespoke care provision that Ryan will need, including physio space, a wet-room, a family area and the ability to access the entire ground floor, and if the family doesn't get this work done, Ryan will remain in hospital 50 miles away

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: The building crusaders come to the aid of 12-year-old Matthew from Telford, Shropshire, who has been stuck in hospital for three years after suffering cancer and a stroke. The youngster's head teacher and school friends have been fundraising to get him home, so now, Nick Knowles and the team - with the help of hundreds of volunteers - set out to make Matthew's home suitable for his complex medical needs

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Noel Fitzpatrick offers cutting-edge treatment for Luca, a long-suffering four-year-old springer spaniel with a painful elbow disease. He designs and creates a special screw for Luca's leg with a system for injecting a bone-growth gel around it, and after an eight-year-old Newfoundland collapses, its owners face an agonising wait for the MRI scans to reveal if anything can be done for the gentle giant

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: As part of the 2013 appeal, Nick Knowles and the team head to Peterborough to help Children in Need-funded organisation Little Miracles, which supports youngsters with disabilities and life-limiting illnesses and their families. However, whereas Mark, Chris, Julian and Billy normally renovate an existing property, for the first time they are knocking down a building and reconstructing it from the ground up - making it worth almost £1million. With just nine days to complete the job, they'll need help - and lots of it. Luckily, tradespeople turn out in force - from both the local area and across the country - giving their time for free

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: In the summer of 2015, West Sussex wife and mother-of-four Amanda fell off her bike while training for an endurance contest, breaking 11 bones, puncturing a lung, and snapping her collarbone and back. Paralysed, she spent the next six months at Stoke Mandeville's spinal unit, while her builder husband Vic looked after the children - but determined to compete again, she returned home in a wheelchair. However, the family home is no longer suitable for Amanda - so that's where Nick Knowles and the rest of the DIY SOS team come in, strengthened by a number of local tradesmen

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the DIY SOS team transform the home of a police officer who was a victim of the Westminster Bridge terrorist attack in March 2017, suffering horrific injuries which left him wheelchair bound. Months after the attack took place, Kris still resides in hospital as his north London home is inaccessible for him, so the team and hundreds of volunteers work to get Kris living back at home to his family

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Rescue Labrador Tom needs work with a serious wound on one of his front paws, and four-year-old French bulldog called Otis has suffered an accident while being chased by another dog. Professor Noel Fitzpatrick diagnoses a spinal problem high up in Otis's neck that requires surgery. Meanwhile, Bailey, a 10-year-old cocker spaniel, has quite a lot of pain in one of his hind limbs, but his owner wants to avoid surgery, and Noel needs to perform specialist imaging before he can offer any solutions

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: As the festive season approaches at Fitzpatrick Referrals, Professor Noel and his team treat three special patients. A one-year-old crossbreed puppy rescued by a charity from Romania is in need of complex surgery, with no guarantee of success. An eight-year-old Dalmatian needs work on its spinal cord, and a Labrador from Switzerland is having trouble walking. Noel's investigations reveal problems with both shoulder and elbow, an unusual combination that requires dramatic intervention

programme.title: DIY SOS

programme.title: Untold: The Disappearance of Shannon Matthews
programme.desc: In February 2008, nine-year-old Shannon Matthews vanishes on her way home from school, triggering one of the highest-profile missing person investigations ever seen in the UK. Her mother is distraught and the community rallies in support, but no trace of the child can be found

programme.title: Untold: The Disappearance of Shannon Matthews
programme.desc: In February 2008, nine-year-old Shannon Matthews vanishes on her way home from school, triggering one of the highest-profile missing person investigations ever seen in the UK. With increasing alarm sweeping through Shannon's hometown and Britain at large, the search for the missing nine-year-old grows in scale

programme.title: Psychopath with Piers Morgan
programme.desc: In 2007, when Paris Bennett was 13 years old, stabbed his four-year-old sister to death, a crime for which he has been behind bars ever since. Now 25 and in his first interview on British television, he tells Piers Morgan how this was no impulsive fit of rage but rather a cold, deliberate act planned as an act of revenge against his mother Charity - who is watching the interview unfold in a nearby room. She has stood by him even though she fears that when he gets out, he could still harbour violent intentions towards her - or even worse, towards his younger brother

programme.title: DIY SOS

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: The building crusaders come to the aid of 12-year-old Matthew from Telford, Shropshire, who has been stuck in hospital for three years after suffering cancer and a stroke. The youngster's head teacher and school friends have been fundraising to get him home, so now, Nick Knowles and the team - with the help of hundreds of volunteers - set out to make Matthew's home suitable for his complex medical needs

programme.title: The Supervet

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Noel Fitzpatrick offers cutting-edge treatment for Luca, a long-suffering four-year-old springer spaniel with a painful elbow disease. He designs and creates a special screw for Luca's leg with a system for injecting a bone-growth gel around it, and after an eight-year-old Newfoundland collapses, its owners face an agonising wait for the MRI scans to reveal if anything can be done for the gentle giant

programme.title: Lies, Deceit and Betrayal
programme.desc: Hundreds of film industry professionals are preyed upon by the Hollywood Con Queen, who defrauded them of over $1.5 million in a campaign lasting several years

programme.title: Lies, Deceit and Betrayal
programme.desc: After Louise meets her partner Andy Camfield, a series of financial mishaps begin to see her regularly giving him money

programme.title: Deadly Waters with Captain Lee
programme.desc: When a woman is swept off her boat by a rogue wave in California, search teams race to find her before it's too late

programme.desc: The Death Cleaners help Lindsey after her mother and extended family leave everything they don't want at her house - causing her to lose her personal style

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: Chris and Tom go to the home of a young woman who is having suicidal thoughts. Ash becomes a passenger in his own ambulance when his grandad is taken ill
